title: Chain of World: World Model Thinking in Latent Motion
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are a promising path toward embodied intelligence, yet they often overlook the predictive and temporal-causal structure underlying visual dynamics. World-model VLAs address this by predicting future frames, but waste capacity reconstructing redundant backgrounds. Latent-action VLAs encode frame-to-frame transitions compactly, but lack temporally continuous dynamic modeling and world knowledge. To overcome these limitations, we introduce CoWVLA (Chain-of-World VLA), a new "Chain of World" paradigm that unifies world-model temporal reasoning with a disentangled latent motion representation. First, a pretrained video VAE serves as a latent motion extractor, explicitly factorizing video segments into structure and motion latents. Then, during pre-training, the VLA learns from an instruction and an initial frame to infer a continuous latent motion chain and predict the segment's terminal frame. Finally, during co-fine-tuning, this latent dynamic is aligned with discrete action prediction by jointly modeling sparse keyframes and action sequences in a unified autoregressive decoder. This design preserves the world-model benefits of temporal reasoning and world knowledge while retaining the compactness and interpretability of latent actions, enabling efficient visuomotor learning. Extensive experiments on robotic simulation benchmarks show that CoWVLA outperforms existing world-model and latent-action approaches and achieves moderate computational efficiency, highlighting its potential as a more effective VLA pretraining paradigm. The project website can be found at https://fx-hit.github.io/cowvla-io.
tldr: The paper introduces CoWVLA, a new Vision-Language-Action model that combines world-model temporal reasoning with a disentangled latent motion representation for efficient visuomotor learning, outperforming existing approaches on robotic simulation benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新的视觉-语言-动作模型CoWVLA，它结合了世界模型的时序推理和解耦的潜在运动表示，以实现高效的视觉运动学习，并在机器人仿真基准测试中优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型是实现具身智能的一条很有前景的途径，但它们常常忽略视觉动态背后潜在的预测性和时间-因果结构。世界模型VLA通过预测未来帧解决这个问题，但却浪费了算力来重建冗余的背景。潜在动作VLA紧凑地编码帧间转换，但缺乏时间连续的动态建模和世界知识。为了克服这些局限性，我们提出了CoWVLA（Chain-of-World VLA），这是一种新的“世界链”范式，它将世界模型的时间推理与解耦后的潜在运动表示统一起来。首先，一个预训练的视频VAE作为潜在运动提取器，明确地将视频片段分解为结构和运动潜在变量。然后，在预训练期间，VLA学习从指令和初始帧推断出一个连续的潜在运动链，并预测该片段的最终帧。最后，在协同微调期间，通过在一个统一的自回归解码器中联合建模稀疏关键帧和动作序列，将这种潜在的动态与离散的动作预测对齐。这种设计保留了世界模型在时间推理和世界知识方面的优势，同时保留了潜在动作的紧凑性和可解释性，从而实现了高效的视觉运动学习。在机器人仿真基准测试上的大量实验表明，CoWVLA优于现有的世界模型和潜在动作方法，并实现了适度的计算效率，突显了其作为一种更有效的VLA预训练范式的潜力。项目网站位于 https://fx-hit.github.io/cowvla-io。

title: TagaVLM: Topology-Aware Global Action Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) presents a unique challenge for Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) due to their inherent architectural mismatch: VLMs are primarily pretrained on static, disembodied vision-language tasks, which fundamentally clash with the dynamic, embodied, and spatially-structured nature of navigation. Existing large-model-based methods often resort to converting rich visual and spatial information into text, forcing models to implicitly infer complex visual-topological relationships or limiting their global action capabilities. To bridge this gap, we propose TagaVLM (Topology-Aware Global Action reasoning), an end-to-end framework that explicitly injects topological structures into the VLM backbone. To introduce topological edge information, Spatial Topology Aware Residual Attention (STAR-Att) directly integrates it into the VLM's self-attention mechanism, enabling intrinsic spatial reasoning while preserving pretrained knowledge. To enhance topological node information, an Interleaved Navigation Prompt strengthens node-level visual-text alignment. Finally, with the embedded topological graph, the model is capable of global action reasoning, allowing for robust path correction. On the R2R benchmark, TagaVLM achieves state-of-the-art performance among large-model-based methods, with a Success Rate (SR) of 51.09% and SPL of 47.18 in unseen environments, outperforming prior work by 3.39% in SR and 9.08 in SPL. This demonstrates that, for embodied spatial reasoning, targeted enhancements on smaller open-source VLMs can be more effective than brute-force model scaling. The code will be released upon publication.Project page: https://apex-bjut.github.io/Taga-VLM
tldr: TagaVLM injects topological structure into VLMs for vision-language navigation, using spatial topology-aware attention and interleaved navigation prompts to achieve state-of-the-art performance among large-model-based methods on the R2R benchmark, suggesting targeted enhancements are more effective than brute-force scaling.
tldr_zh: TagaVLM 通过将拓扑结构注入视觉语言模型 (VLM) 中，用于视觉-语言导航。它使用空间拓扑感知注意力机制和交错导航提示，在 R2R 基准测试中实现了基于大型模型的最新性能，表明有针对性的增强比暴力扩展更有效。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言导航 (VLN) 对大型视觉-语言模型 (VLM) 提出了独特的挑战，因为它们存在固有的架构不匹配：VLM 主要在静态、非具身视觉-语言任务上进行预训练，这与导航的动态、具身和空间结构化本质存在根本冲突。现有基于大型模型的方法通常将丰富的视觉和空间信息转换为文本，迫使模型隐式地推断复杂的视觉-拓扑关系，或者限制其全局动作能力。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出 TagaVLM (拓扑感知全局动作推理)，这是一个端到端框架，它将拓扑结构显式地注入到 VLM 主干网络中。为了引入拓扑边缘信息，空间拓扑感知残差注意力 (STAR-Att) 将其直接集成到 VLM 的自注意力机制中，从而在保留预训练知识的同时实现内在的空间推理。为了增强拓扑节点信息，交错导航提示加强了节点级别的视觉-文本对齐。最后，借助嵌入的拓扑图，该模型能够进行全局动作推理，从而实现稳健的路径修正。在 R2R 基准测试中，TagaVLM 在基于大型模型的方法中实现了最先进的性能，在未见环境中取得了 51.09% 的成功率 (SR) 和 47.18 的 SPL，在 SR 方面超越了先前工作 3.39%，在 SPL 方面超越了 9.08。 这表明，对于具身空间推理，对较小的开源 VLM 进行有针对性的增强可能比强制进行模型缩放更有效。代码将在发布后公开。项目页面：https://apex-bjut.github.io/Taga-VLM

title: CoFL: Continuous Flow Fields for Language-Conditioned Navigation
summary: Language-conditioned navigation pipelines often rely on brittle modular components or costly action-sequence generation. To address these limitations, we present CoFL, an end-to-end policy that directly maps a bird's-eye view (BEV) observation and a language instruction to a continuous flow field for navigation. Instead of predicting discrete action tokens or sampling action chunks via iterative denoising, CoFL outputs instantaneous velocities that can be queried at arbitrary 2D projected locations. Trajectories are obtained by numerical integration of the predicted field, producing smooth motion that remains reactive under closed-loop execution. To enable large-scale training, we build a dataset of over 500k BEV image-instruction pairs, each procedurally annotated with a flow field and a trajectory derived from BEV semantic maps built on Matterport3D and ScanNet. By training on a mixed distribution, CoFL significantly outperforms modular Vision-Language Model (VLM)-based planners and generative policy baselines on strictly unseen scenes. Finally, we deploy CoFL zero-shot in real-world experiments with overhead BEV observations across multiple layouts, maintaining reliable closed-loop control and a high success rate.
tldr: The paper introduces CoFL, an end-to-end policy that uses continuous flow fields for language-conditioned navigation, achieving strong performance in simulated and real-world environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为CoFL的端到端策略，它使用连续流场进行语言条件导航，在模拟和真实环境中都取得了优异的性能。
summary_zh: 语言条件导航流程通常依赖于脆弱的模块化组件或代价高昂的动作序列生成。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了CoFL，一种端到端策略，它直接将鸟瞰图(BEV)视角下的观测和语言指令映射到一个用于导航的连续流场。CoFL并不预测离散的动作token或通过迭代去噪采样动作块，而是输出瞬时速度，这些速度可以在任意2D投影位置进行查询。通过对预测流场进行数值积分获得轨迹，从而产生流畅的运动，并在闭环执行下保持响应性。为了实现大规模训练，我们构建了一个包含超过50万个BEV图像-指令对的数据集，每个数据集都基于Matterport3D和ScanNet构建的BEV语义地图，以程序化方式标注流场和轨迹。通过在混合分布上训练，CoFL在严格未见场景中显著优于基于模块化视觉-语言模型(VLM)的规划器和生成策略基线。最后，我们在真实世界的实验中，通过俯视BEV观测在多种布局下以零样本方式部署CoFL，保持了可靠的闭环控制和较高的成功率。

title: ACE-Brain-0: Spatial Intelligence as a Shared Scaffold for Universal Embodiments
summary: Universal embodied intelligence demands robust generalization across heterogeneous embodiments, such as autonomous driving, robotics, and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). However, existing embodied brain in training a unified model over diverse embodiments frequently triggers long-tail data, gradient interference, and catastrophic forgetting, making it notoriously difficult to balance universal generalization with domain-specific proficiency. In this report, we introduce ACE-Brain-0, a generalist foundation brain that unifies spatial reasoning, autonomous driving, and embodied manipulation within a single multimodal large language model~(MLLM). Our key insight is that spatial intelligence serves as a universal scaffold across diverse physical embodiments: although vehicles, robots, and UAVs differ drastically in morphology, they share a common need for modeling 3D mental space, making spatial cognition a natural, domain-agnostic foundation for cross-embodiment transfer. Building on this insight, we propose the Scaffold-Specialize-Reconcile~(SSR) paradigm, which first establishes a shared spatial foundation, then cultivates domain-specialized experts, and finally harmonizes them through data-free model merging. Furthermore, we adopt Group Relative Policy Optimization~(GRPO) to strengthen the model's comprehensive capability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ACE-Brain-0 achieves competitive and even state-of-the-art performance across 24 spatial and embodiment-related benchmarks.
tldr: ACE-Brain-0 is a multimodal large language model that uses spatial intelligence as a shared foundation to unify spatial reasoning, autonomous driving, and embodied manipulation across diverse embodiments, achieving competitive results across multiple benchmarks.
tldr_zh: ACE-Brain-0是一个多模态大型语言模型，它利用空间智能作为共享基础，统一了空间推理、自动驾驶和具身操作，适用于各种具身对象，并在多个基准测试中取得了有竞争力的结果。
summary_zh: 通用具身智能需要在异构载体上实现稳健的泛化能力，例如自动驾驶、机器人和无人航空载具（UAV）。然而，现有训练统一模型以实现不同载体的具身大脑的方法，经常会触发长尾数据、梯度干扰和灾难性遗忘的问题，使得在通用泛化能力和领域特定熟练度之间取得平衡变得异常困难。在本报告中，我们介绍了ACE-Brain-0，一个通用的基础大脑，它在一个多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）中统一了空间推理、自动驾驶和具身操作。我们的核心洞察是，空间智能可以作为不同物理载体之间的通用支架：虽然车辆、机器人和无人机在形态上差异巨大，但它们都共同需要对3D心理空间进行建模，使得空间认知成为跨载体迁移的自然且领域无关的基础。基于这一洞察，我们提出了支架-特化-调解（SSR）范式，该范式首先建立共享的空间基础，然后培养领域专业化的专家，最后通过无数据模型融合来协调它们。此外，我们采用分组相对策略优化（GRPO）来加强模型的全面能力。大量的实验表明，ACE-Brain-0在24个空间和具身相关的基准测试中实现了具有竞争力的甚至是最先进的性能。

title: From Language to Action: Can LLM-Based Agents Be Used for Embodied Robot Cognition?
summary: In order to flexibly act in an everyday environment, a robotic agent needs a variety of cognitive capabilities that enable it to reason about plans and perform execution recovery. Large language models (LLMs) have been shown to demonstrate emergent cognitive aspects, such as reasoning and language understanding; however, the ability to control embodied robotic agents requires reliably bridging high-level language to low-level functionalities for perception and control. In this paper, we investigate the extent to which an LLM can serve as a core component for planning and execution reasoning in a cognitive robot architecture. For this purpose, we propose a cognitive architecture in which an agentic LLM serves as the core component for planning and reasoning, while components for working and episodic memories support learning from experience and adaptation. An instance of the architecture is then used to control a mobile manipulator in a simulated household environment, where environment interaction is done through a set of high-level tools for perception, reasoning, navigation, grasping, and placement, all of which are made available to the LLM-based agent. We evaluate our proposed system on two household tasks (object placement and object swapping), which evaluate the agent's reasoning, planning, and memory utilisation. The results demonstrate that the LLM-driven agent can complete structured tasks and exhibits emergent adaptation and memory-guided planning, but also reveal significant limitations, such as hallucinations about the task success and poor instruction following by refusing to acknowledge and complete sequential tasks. These findings highlight both the potential and challenges of employing LLMs as embodied cognitive controllers for autonomous robots.
tldr: This paper explores the use of LLMs as a core component for planning and execution reasoning in a cognitive robot architecture, demonstrating both the potential and limitations in simulated household tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用大型语言模型（LLM）作为认知机器人架构中规划和执行推理的核心组件，并在模拟家庭任务中展示了其潜力和局限性。
summary_zh: 为了在日常环境中灵活行动，机器人代理需要多种认知能力，使其能够对计划进行推理并执行恢复。大型语言模型 (LLM) 已被证明能够展现出涌现的认知特性，例如推理和语言理解；然而，控制具身机器人代理需要可靠地将高层语言桥接到用于感知和控制的底层功能。在本文中，我们研究了一个LLM能够在多大程度上作为认知机器人架构中规划和执行推理的核心组件。为此，我们提出了一种认知架构，其中一个基于代理的LLM充当规划和推理的核心组件，而工作记忆和情景记忆组件支持从经验中学习和适应。该架构的一个实例随后用于控制模拟家庭环境中的移动操作臂，其中环境交互通过一组用于感知、推理、导航、抓取和放置的高层工具完成，所有这些工具都可供基于LLM的代理使用。我们在两个家庭任务（对象放置和对象交换）上评估了我们提出的系统，这些任务评估了代理的推理、规划和记忆利用。结果表明，LLM驱动的代理可以完成结构化任务，并表现出涌现的适应性和记忆引导的规划，但也揭示了显着的局限性，例如关于任务成功的幻觉以及通过拒绝承认和完成连续任务而表现出的糟糕的指令遵循。这些发现突显了使用LLM作为自主机器人的具身认知控制器的潜力和挑战。

title: CMoE: Contrastive Mixture of Experts for Motion Control and Terrain Adaptation of Humanoid Robots
summary: For effective deployment in real-world environments, humanoid robots must autonomously navigate a diverse range of complex terrains with abrupt transitions. While the Vanilla mixture of experts (MoE) framework is theoretically capable of modeling diverse terrain features, in practice, the gating network exhibits nearly uniform expert activations across different terrains, weakening the expert specialization and limiting the model's expressive power. To address this limitation, we introduce CMoE, a novel single-stage reinforcement learning framework that integrates contrastive learning to refine expert activation distributions. By imposing contrastive constraints, CMoE maximizes the consistency of expert activations within the same terrain while minimizing their similarity across different terrains, thereby encouraging experts to specialize in distinct terrain types. We validated our approach on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot through a series of challenging experiments. Results demonstrate that CMoE enables the robot to traverse continuous steps up to 20 cm high and gaps up to 80 cm wide, while achieving robust and natural gait across diverse mixed terrains, surpassing the limits of existing methods. To support further research and foster community development, we release our code publicly.
tldr: The paper introduces CMoE, a contrastive learning-enhanced Mixture of Experts framework for humanoid robot motion control and terrain adaptation, enabling robust navigation across complex terrains.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为CMoE的对比学习增强的专家混合框架，用于人形机器人运动控制和地形适应，从而能够在复杂地形上实现稳健的导航。
summary_zh: 为了在真实世界环境中有效部署，人形机器人必须能够自主地导航各种具有突变过渡的复杂地形。虽然原始的专家混合（MoE）框架在理论上有能力建模各种地形特征，但在实践中，门控网络在不同地形上表现出几乎均匀的专家激活，削弱了专家 specialization 并限制了模型的表达能力。为了解决这一限制，我们引入了CMoE，一种新颖的单阶段强化学习框架，该框架集成了对比学习以优化专家激活分布。通过施加对比约束，CMoE最大化相同地形内专家激活的一致性，同时最小化不同地形之间的相似性，从而鼓励专家 specialize 于不同的地形类型。我们通过一系列具有挑战性的实验，在宇树G1人形机器人上验证了我们的方法。结果表明，CMoE使机器人能够穿越高达20厘米的连续台阶和宽达80厘米的间隙，同时在各种混合地形上实现稳健而自然的步态，超越了现有方法的限制。为了支持进一步的研究并促进社区发展，我们将公开发布我们的代码。

title: MA-CoNav: A Master-Slave Multi-Agent Framework with Hierarchical Collaboration and Dual-Level Reflection for Long-Horizon Embodied VLN
summary: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) aims to empower robots with the ability to perform long-horizon navigation in unfamiliar environments based on complex linguistic instructions. Its success critically hinges on establishing an efficient ``language-understanding -- visual-perception -- embodied-execution'' closed loop. Existing methods often suffer from perceptual distortion and decision drift in complex, long-distance tasks due to the cognitive overload of a single agent. Inspired by distributed cognition theory, this paper proposes MA-CoNav, a Multi-Agent Collaborative Navigation framework. This framework adopts a ``Master-Slave'' hierarchical agent collaboration architecture, decoupling and distributing the perception, planning, execution, and memory functions required for navigation tasks to specialized agents. Specifically, the Master Agent is responsible for global orchestration, while the Subordinate Agent group collaborates through a clear division of labor: an Observation Agent generates environment descriptions, a Planning Agent performs task decomposition and dynamic verification, an Execution Agent handles simultaneous mapping and action, and a Memory Agent manages structured experiences. Furthermore, the framework introduces a ``Local-Global'' dual-stage reflection mechanism to dynamically optimize the entire navigation pipeline. Empirical experiments were conducted using a real-world indoor dataset collected by a Limo Pro robot, with no scene-specific fine-tuning performed on the models throughout the process. The results demonstrate that MA-CoNav comprehensively outperforms existing mainstream VLN methods across multiple metrics.
tldr: The paper introduces MA-CoNav, a multi-agent framework for Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) that uses a master-slave architecture and dual-level reflection to improve long-horizon navigation in complex environments, demonstrating superior performance without scene-specific fine-tuning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MA-CoNav，一个用于视觉-语言导航（VLN）的多智能体框架，它使用主从架构和双层反射来改善复杂环境中长距离导航，并在没有场景特定微调的情况下表现出卓越的性能。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言导航（VLN）旨在赋予机器人在不熟悉的环境中，基于复杂的语言指令执行长程导航的能力。其成功关键在于建立高效的“语言理解-视觉感知-具身执行”闭环。由于单个智能体的认知负荷过重，现有方法通常在复杂的、长距离的任务中遭受感知失真和决策漂移。受分布式认知理论的启发，本文提出了一种多智能体协同导航框架（MA-CoNav）。该框架采用“主从”分层智能体协同架构，解耦并将导航任务所需的感知、规划、执行和记忆功能分配给专业的智能体。具体而言，主智能体负责全局编排，而从属智能体组通过明确的分工进行协作：观察智能体生成环境描述，规划智能体执行任务分解和动态验证，执行智能体处理同步地图构建和动作，记忆智能体管理结构化经验。此外，该框架引入了“局部-全局”双阶段反思机制，以动态优化整个导航流程。使用Limo Pro机器人在真实室内环境中收集的数据集进行了实证实验，整个过程中没有对模型进行场景特定的微调。结果表明，MA-CoNav在多个指标上全面优于现有的主流VLN方法。

title: DreamFlow: Local Navigation Beyond Observation via Conditional Flow Matching in the Latent Space
summary: Local navigation in cluttered environments often suffers from dense obstacles and frequent local minima. Conventional local planners rely on heuristics and are prone to failure, while deep reinforcement learning(DRL)based approaches provide adaptability but are constrained by limited onboard sensing. These limitations lead to navigation failures because the robot cannot perceive structures outside its field of view. In this paper, we propose DreamFlow, a DRL-based local navigation framework that extends the robot's perceptual horizon through conditional flow matching(CFM). The proposed CFM based prediction module learns probabilistic mapping between local height map latent representation and broader spatial representation conditioned on navigation context. This enables the navigation policy to predict unobserved environmental features and proactively avoid potential local minima. Experimental results demonstrate that DreamFlow outperforms existing methods in terms of latent prediction accuracy and navigation performance in simulation. The proposed method was further validated in cluttered real world environments with a quadrupedal robot. The project page is available at https://dreamflow-icra.github.io.
tldr: DreamFlow is a DRL-based local navigation framework that uses conditional flow matching to predict unobserved environmental features, improving navigation performance in cluttered environments.
tldr_zh: DreamFlow是一个基于深度强化学习的局部导航框架，它利用条件流匹配来预测未观察到的环境特征，从而提高在杂乱环境中的导航性能。
summary_zh: 在拥挤环境中的局部导航经常面临障碍物密集和频繁局部最小值的问题。传统的局部规划器依赖于启发式方法，容易失效；而基于深度强化学习（DRL）的方法虽然具有适应性，但受到板载传感能力有限的制约。这些限制导致导航失败，因为机器人无法感知视野之外的结构。在本文中，我们提出了DreamFlow，一个基于DRL的局部导航框架，通过条件流匹配（CFM）扩展了机器人的感知范围。所提出的基于CFM的预测模块学习了在导航上下文条件下，局部高度图潜在表征和更广阔空间表征之间的概率映射。这使得导航策略能够预测未观测到的环境特征，并主动避免潜在的局部最小值。实验结果表明，在模拟环境中，DreamFlow在潜在预测精度和导航性能方面均优于现有方法。提出的方法进一步在具有四足机器人的拥挤真实环境中进行了验证。项目主页位于https://dreamflow-icra.github.io。

title: Generative adversarial imitation learning for robot swarms: Learning from human demonstrations and trained policies
summary: In imitation learning, robots are supposed to learn from demonstrations of the desired behavior. Most of the work in imitation learning for swarm robotics provides the demonstrations as rollouts of an existing policy. In this work, we provide a framework based on generative adversarial imitation learning that aims to learn collective behaviors from human demonstrations. Our framework is evaluated across six different missions, learning both from manual demonstrations and demonstrations derived from a PPO-trained policy. Results show that the imitation learning process is able to learn qualitatively meaningful behaviors that perform similarly well as the provided demonstrations. Additionally, we deploy the learned policies on a swarm of TurtleBot 4 robots in real-robot experiments. The exhibited behaviors preserved their visually recognizable character and their performance is comparable to the one achieved in simulation.
tldr: This paper presents a generative adversarial imitation learning framework for robot swarms, enabling them to learn collective behaviors from human demonstrations and pre-trained policies, validated in simulation and real-world robot experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于机器人集群的生成对抗模仿学习框架，使其能够从人类演示和预训练策略中学习集体行为，并在仿真和真实机器人实验中得到了验证。
summary_zh: 在模仿学习中，机器人应从期望行为的演示中学习。 针对群体机器人的模仿学习中的大部分工作都将演示作为现有策略的推演提供。 在这项工作中，我们提供了一个基于生成对抗模仿学习的框架，旨在从人类演示中学习集体行为。 我们的框架在六个不同的任务中进行了评估，既从手动演示中学习，也从PPO训练策略衍生的演示中学习。 结果表明，模仿学习过程能够学习到定性上有意义的行为，其性能与所提供的演示相似。 此外，我们在真实的机器人实验中，将学习到的策略部署到一群TurtleBot 4机器人上。 展示的行为保留了其视觉上可识别的特征，并且其性能与在模拟中实现的性能相当。

title: Agentic Self-Evolutionary Replanning for Embodied Navigation
summary: Failure is inevitable for embodied navigation in complex environments. To enhance the resilience, replanning (RP) is a viable option, where the robot is allowed to fail, but is capable of adjusting plan until success. However, existing RP approaches freeze the ego action model and miss the opportunities to explore better plans by upgrading the robot itself. To address this limitation, we propose Self-Evolutionary RePlanning, or SERP for short, which leads to a paradigm shift from frozen models towards evolving models by run-time learning from recent experiences. In contrast to existing model evolution approaches that often get stuck at predefined static parameters, we introduce agentic self-evolving action model that uses in-context learning with auto-differentiation (ILAD) for adaptive function adjustment and global parameter reset. To achieve token-efficient replanning for SERP, we also propose graph chain-of-thought (GCOT) replanning with large language model (LLM) inference over distilled graphs. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that SERP achieves higher success rate with lower token expenditure over various benchmarks, validating its superior robustness and efficiency across diverse environments.
tldr: This paper introduces SERP, a self-evolutionary replanning approach for embodied navigation that uses in-context learning with auto-differentiation and graph chain-of-thought replanning with LLMs to improve robustness and efficiency by allowing the robot to learn from its replanning experiences.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种用于具身导航的自进化重规划方法SERP，它利用上下文学习与自动微分以及图链式思维重规划与大型语言模型，通过允许机器人从其重规划经验中学习，从而提高鲁棒性和效率。
summary_zh: 在复杂的具身导航环境中，失败是不可避免的。为了增强韧性，重规划 (RP) 是一种可行的方案，允许机器人失败，但能够调整计划直至成功。然而，现有的重规划方法冻结了自我的行动模型，错失了通过升级机器人本身来探索更好计划的机会。为了解决这一局限，我们提出了一种自进化重规划 (Self-Evolutionary RePlanning, 或称 SERP)，它引领了一种从冻结模型向进化模型的范式转变，通过从近期经验中进行运行时学习来实现。与通常停滞在预定义静态参数的现有模型进化方法不同，我们引入了具有语境学习和自动微分的智能体自进化行动模型 (ILAD)，用于自适应函数调整和全局参数重置。为了实现 SERP 的令牌高效重规划，我们还提出了一种基于精炼图的大语言模型 (LLM) 推理的图链式思考 (GCOT) 重规划。大量的仿真和真实世界实验表明，SERP 在各种基准测试中实现了更高的成功率和更低的令牌消耗，验证了其在不同环境中卓越的鲁棒性和效率。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Robots via Retrieve-Reason-Act
summary: To achieve general-purpose utility, we argue that robots must evolve from passive executors into active Information Retrieval users. In strictly zero-shot settings where no prior demonstrations exist, robots face a critical information gap, such as the exact sequence required to assemble a complex furniture kit, that cannot be satisfied by internal parametric knowledge (common sense) or past internal memory. While recent robotic works attempt to use search before action, they primarily focus on retrieving past kinematic trajectories (analogous to searching internal memory) or text-based safety rules (searching for constraints). These approaches fail to address the core information need of active task construction: acquiring unseen procedural knowledge from external, unstructured documentation. In this paper, we define the paradigm as Retrieval-Augmented Robotics (RAR), empowering the robot with the information-seeking capability that bridges the gap between visual documentation and physical actuation. We formulate the task execution as an iterative Retrieve-Reason-Act loop: the robot or embodied agent actively retrieves relevant visual procedural manuals from an unstructured corpus, grounds the abstract 2D diagrams to 3D physical parts via cross-modal alignment, and synthesizes executable plans. We validate this paradigm on a challenging long-horizon assembly benchmark. Our experiments demonstrate that grounding robotic planning in retrieved visual documents significantly outperforms baselines relying on zero-shot reasoning or few-shot example retrieval. This work establishes the basis of RAR, extending the scope of Information Retrieval from answering user queries to driving embodied physical actions.
tldr: The paper introduces Retrieval-Augmented Robotics (RAR), a framework where robots actively retrieve and utilize visual procedural knowledge from unstructured data to perform complex assembly tasks in zero-shot settings, outperforming zero-shot reasoning and few-shot baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了检索增强机器人(RAR)，该框架使机器人在零样本环境中主动检索和利用非结构化数据中的视觉程序知识来执行复杂的组装任务，优于零样本推理和少样本基线。
summary_zh: 为了实现通用性，我们认为机器人必须从被动的执行者进化为主动的信息检索用户。在严格的零样本设置中，不存在先前的演示，机器人面临着关键的信息缺口，例如组装复杂家具套件所需的精确步骤顺序，这些信息缺口无法通过内部参数知识（常识）或过去的内部记忆来满足。尽管最近的机器人研究试图在行动前进行搜索，但它们主要关注于检索过去的运动学轨迹（类似于搜索内部记忆）或基于文本的安全规则（搜索约束）。这些方法未能解决主动任务构建的核心信息需求：从外部的、非结构化文档中获取未见过的程序性知识。在本文中，我们将这种范式定义为检索增强机器人(Retrieval-Augmented Robotics, RAR)，赋予机器人信息搜索能力，从而弥合视觉文档和物理执行之间的差距。我们将任务执行形式化为一种迭代的检索-推理-行动循环：机器人或具身智能体主动地从非结构化的语料库中检索相关的视觉程序手册，通过跨模态对齐将抽象的2D图表对齐到3D物理部件，并合成可执行的计划。我们在一个具有挑战性的长程组装基准上验证了这种范式。实验表明，将机器人规划建立在检索到的视觉文档之上，显著优于依赖于零样本推理或少样本示例检索的基线方法。这项工作奠定了RAR的基础，将信息检索的范围从回答用户查询扩展到驱动具身的物理行动。

title: IMR-LLM: Industrial Multi-Robot Task Planning and Program Generation using Large Language Models
summary: In modern industrial production, multiple robots often collaborate to complete complex manufacturing tasks. Large language models (LLMs), with their strong reasoning capabilities, have shown potential in coordinating robots for simple household and manipulation tasks. However, in industrial scenarios, stricter sequential constraints and more complex dependencies within tasks present new challenges for LLMs. To address this, we propose IMR-LLM, a novel LLM-driven Industrial Multi-Robot task planning and program generation framework. Specifically, we utilize LLMs to assist in constructing disjunctive graphs and employ deterministic solving methods to obtain a feasible and efficient high-level task plan. Based on this, we use a process tree to guide LLMs to generate executable low-level programs. Additionally, we create IMR-Bench, a challenging benchmark that encompasses multi-robot industrial tasks across three levels of complexity. Experimental results indicate that our method significantly surpasses existing methods across all evaluation metrics.
tldr: This paper introduces IMR-LLM, a framework using LLMs for industrial multi-robot task planning and program generation. It outperforms existing methods on a newly created benchmark, IMR-Bench.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了IMR-LLM，一个使用LLM进行工业多机器人任务规划和程序生成的框架。 该方法在一个新创建的基准测试IMR-Bench上优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 在现代工业生产中，多机器人常协作完成复杂的制造任务。大型语言模型（LLMs）凭借其强大的推理能力，已展现出在协调机器人完成简单的家务和操作任务方面的潜力。然而，在工业场景中，更严格的顺序约束和任务内更复杂的依赖关系对LLMs提出了新的挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了IMR-LLM，一种新颖的LLM驱动的工业多机器人任务规划与程序生成框架。具体而言，我们利用LLMs辅助构建析取图，并采用确定性求解方法获得可行且高效的高级任务计划。在此基础上，我们使用过程树来引导LLMs生成可执行的低级程序。此外，我们创建了IMR-Bench，这是一个具有挑战性的基准测试，包含了跨越三个复杂度级别的多机器人工业任务。实验结果表明，我们的方法在所有评估指标上均显著优于现有方法。

title: Watch Your Step: Learning Semantically-Guided Locomotion in Cluttered Environment
summary: Although legged robots demonstrate impressive mobility on rough terrain, using them safely in cluttered environments remains a challenge. A key issue is their inability to avoid stepping on low-lying objects, such as high-cost small devices or cables on flat ground. This limitation arises from a disconnection between high-level semantic understanding and low-level control, combined with errors in elevation maps during real-world operation. To address this, we introduce SemLoco, a Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework designed to avoid obstacles precisely in densely cluttered environments. SemLoco uses a two-stage RL approach that combines both soft and hard constraints and performs pixel-wise foothold safety inference, enabling more accurate foot placement. Additionally, SemLoco integrates a semantic map to assign traversability costs rather than relying solely on geometric data. SemLoco significantly reduces collisions and improves safety around sensitive objects, enabling reliable navigation in situations where traditional controllers would likely cause damage. Experimental results further demonstrate that SemLoco can be effectively applied to more complex, unstructured real-world environments.
tldr: The paper introduces SemLoco, an RL framework that combines semantic understanding with low-level control for legged robots to navigate cluttered environments safely by avoiding sensitive objects, using a two-stage approach and integrating a semantic map for traversability.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SemLoco，一个强化学习框架，结合了语义理解和底层控制，使足式机器人在杂乱环境中安全导航，通过避免敏感物体，采用两阶段方法，并集成语义地图进行可通行性评估。
summary_zh: 尽管足式机器人在崎岖地形上展现出令人印象深刻的移动能力，但在杂乱环境中安全地使用它们仍然是一个挑战。一个关键问题是它们无法避免踩到低矮物体，例如平地上高成本的小型设备或电缆。这种局限性源于高层语义理解与低层控制之间的脱节，以及真实世界运行中高程图的误差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出SemLoco，一个旨在在密集杂乱环境中精确避障的强化学习(RL)框架。SemLoco采用两阶段RL方法，结合了软约束和硬约束，并执行像素级落脚点安全推断，从而实现更精确的足部放置。此外，SemLoco集成了语义地图以分配可通过性成本，而不是仅仅依赖于几何数据。SemLoco显著减少了碰撞并提高了敏感物体周围的安全性，从而可以在传统控制器可能造成损坏的情况下实现可靠的导航。实验结果进一步表明，SemLoco可以有效地应用于更复杂、非结构化的真实世界环境。

title: Compositional Visual Planning via Inference-Time Diffusion Scaling
summary: Diffusion models excel at short-horizon robot planning, yet scaling them to long-horizon tasks remains challenging due to computational constraints and limited training data. Existing compositional approaches stitch together short segments by separately denoising each component and averaging overlapping regions. However, this suffers from instability as the factorization assumption breaks down in noisy data space, leading to inconsistent global plans. We propose that the key to stable compositional generation lies in enforcing boundary agreement on the estimated clean data (Tweedie estimates) rather than on noisy intermediate states. Our method formulates long-horizon planning as inference over a chain-structured factor graph of overlapping video chunks, where pretrained short-horizon video diffusion models provide local priors. At inference time, we enforce boundary agreement through a novel combination of synchronous and asynchronous message passing that operates on Tweedie estimates, producing globally consistent guidance without requiring additional training. Our training-free framework demonstrates significant improvements over existing baselines, effectively generalizing to unseen start-goal combinations that were not present in the original training data. Project website: https://comp-visual-planning.github.io/
tldr: This paper proposes a training-free method for long-horizon robot planning using diffusion models by enforcing boundary agreement on Tweedie estimates in a factor graph framework, improving stability and generalization compared to existing compositional approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用扩散模型进行长程机器人规划的免训练方法，通过在因子图框架中对Tweedie估计量强制执行边界一致性，与现有的组合方法相比，提高了稳定性和泛化能力。
summary_zh: 扩散模型在短时域机器人规划中表现出色，但由于计算约束和有限的训练数据，将其扩展到长时域任务仍然具有挑战性。现有的组合方法通过分别去噪各个组成部分并平均重叠区域来拼接短片段。然而，由于因子分解假设在噪声数据空间中失效，这会导致不稳定性，从而产生不一致的全局规划。我们提出，稳定组合生成的关键在于在估计的干净数据（Tweedie 估计）上而非在嘈杂的中间状态上强制执行边界一致性。我们的方法将长时域规划公式化为重叠视频块的链式结构因子图上的推断，其中预训练的短时域视频扩散模型提供局部先验。在推理时，我们通过一种新颖的同步和异步消息传递组合来强制 Tweedie 估计的边界一致性，从而产生全局一致的指导，而无需额外的训练。我们的无训练框架展示了优于现有基线的显著改进，有效地泛化到原始训练数据中不存在的未见过的起点-目标组合。项目网站：https://comp-visual-planning.github.io/

title: Uni-Skill: Building Self-Evolving Skill Repository for Generalizable Robotic Manipulation
summary: While skill-centric approaches leverage foundation models to enhance generalization in compositional tasks, they often rely on fixed skill libraries, limiting adaptability to new tasks without manual intervention. To address this, we propose Uni-Skill, a Unified Skill-centric framework that supports skill-aware planning and facilitates automatic skill evolution. Unlike prior methods that restrict planning to predefined skills, Uni-Skill requests for new skill implementations when existing ones are insufficient, ensuring adaptable planning with self-augmented skill library. To support automatic implementation of diverse skills requested by the planning module, we construct SkillFolder, a VerbNet-inspired repository derived from large-scale unstructured robotic videos. SkillFolder introduces a hierarchical skill taxonomy that captures diverse skill descriptions at multiple levels of abstraction. By populating this taxonomy with large-scale, automatically annotated demonstrations, Uni-Skill shifts the paradigm of skill acquisition from inefficient manual annotation to efficient offline structural retrieval. Retrieved examples provide semantic supervision over behavior patterns and fine-grained references for spatial trajectories, enabling few-shot skill inference without deployment-time demonstrations. Comprehensive experiments in both simulation and real-world settings verify the state-of-the-art performance of Uni-Skill over existing VLM-based skill-centric approaches, highlighting its advanced reasoning capabilities and strong zero-shot generalization across a wide range of novel tasks.
tldr: Uni-Skill introduces a framework for robotic manipulation that automatically expands its skill library by retrieving and adapting skills from a VerbNet-inspired repository of robotic videos, enabling zero-shot generalization to new tasks.
tldr_zh: Uni-Skill 提出了一种机器人操作框架，通过从一个受 VerbNet 启发的机器人视频库中检索和调整技能，自动扩展其技能库，从而实现对新任务的零样本泛化。
summary_zh: 尽管以技能为中心的方法利用基础模型来增强组合任务中的泛化能力，但它们通常依赖于固定的技能库，限制了在没有人工干预的情况下适应新任务的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了Uni-Skill，一个统一的以技能为中心的框架，支持技能感知的规划并促进技能的自动进化。与先前将规划限制在预定义技能的方法不同，当现有技能不足时，Uni-Skill会请求新的技能实现，从而确保通过自我增强的技能库进行适应性规划。为了支持规划模块请求的各种技能的自动实现，我们构建了SkillFolder，一个受VerbNet启发的存储库，它源自大规模非结构化机器人视频。SkillFolder引入了一个分层的技能分类法，该分类法以多个抽象级别捕获不同的技能描述。通过使用大规模、自动标注的演示填充这个分类法，Uni-Skill将技能获取的范式从低效的手动标注转变为高效的离线结构化检索。检索到的示例为行为模式提供语义监督，并为空间轨迹提供精细的参考，从而无需部署时演示即可实现少样本技能推理。在模拟和现实环境中的综合实验验证了Uni-Skill相对于现有基于VLM的以技能为中心的方法的领先性能，突出了其先进的推理能力和在各种新颖任务中的强大零样本泛化能力。

title: Real-Time Generative Policy via Langevin-Guided Flow Matching for Autonomous Driving
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a fundamental methodology in autonomous driving systems, where generative policies exhibit considerable potential by leveraging their ability to model complex distributions to enhance exploration. However, their inherent high inference latency severely impedes their deployment in real-time decision-making and control. To address this issue, we propose diffusion actor-critic with entropy regulator via flow matching (DACER-F) by introducing flow matching into online RL, enabling the generation of competitive actions in a single inference step. By leveraging Langevin dynamics and gradients of the Q-function, DACER-F dynamically optimizes actions from experience replay toward a target distribution that balances high Q-value information with exploratory behavior. The flow policy is then trained to efficiently learn a mapping from a simple prior distribution to this dynamic target. In complex multi-lane and intersection simulations, DACER-F outperforms baselines diffusion actor-critic with entropy regulator (DACER) and distributional soft actor-critic (DSAC), while maintaining an ultra-low inference latency. DACER-F further demonstrates its scalability on standard RL benchmark DeepMind Control Suite (DMC), achieving a score of 775.8 in the humanoid-stand task and surpassing prior methods. Collectively, these results establish DACER-F as a high-performance and computationally efficient RL algorithm.
tldr: The paper introduces DACER-F, a novel reinforcement learning algorithm for autonomous driving that uses flow matching to achieve real-time generative policy inference. It outperforms existing methods in complex simulations and benchmark tasks while maintaining ultra-low inference latency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了DACER-F，一种新颖的用于自动驾驶的强化学习算法，它使用流匹配来实现实时生成策略推断。在复杂的模拟和基准测试中，它优于现有方法，同时保持超低推断延迟。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）是自动驾驶系统中的一项基本方法，其中生成式策略凭借其对复杂分布进行建模的能力以增强探索，展现出巨大的潜力。然而，其固有的高推理延迟严重阻碍了它们在实时决策和控制中的部署。为了解决这个问题，我们通过将流匹配引入在线RL，提出了一种基于流匹配的扩散演员-评论家算法与熵正则化(DACER-F)，从而能够在单个推理步骤中生成具有竞争力的行为。通过利用 Langevin 动力学和 Q 函数的梯度，DACER-F 动态地优化来自经验回放的行为，使其趋向于一个平衡高 Q 值信息和探索行为的目标分布。然后，训练流策略以高效地学习从一个简单的先验分布到这个动态目标的映射。在复杂的多车道和交叉路口仿真中，DACER-F 优于基线算法，包括基于熵正则化的扩散演员-评论家算法 (DACER) 和分布软演员-评论家算法 (DSAC)，同时保持了极低的推理延迟。DACER-F 进一步证明了其在标准 RL 基准测试 DeepMind Control Suite (DMC) 上的可扩展性，在人形机器人站立任务中获得了 775.8 的分数，超过了之前的方法。总的来说，这些结果确立了 DACER-F 作为一种高性能且计算高效的 RL 算法。

title: VLMFusionOcc3D: VLM Assisted Multi-Modal 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction
summary: This paper introduces VLMFusionOcc3D, a robust multimodal framework for dense 3D semantic occupancy prediction in autonomous driving. Current voxel-based occupancy models often struggle with semantic ambiguity in sparse geometric grids and performance degradation under adverse weather conditions. To address these challenges, we leverage the rich linguistic priors of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to anchor ambiguous voxel features to stable semantic concepts. Our framework initiates with a dual-branch feature extraction pipeline that projects multi-view images and LiDAR point clouds into a unified voxel space. We propose Instance-driven VLM Attention (InstVLM), which utilizes gated cross-attention and LoRA-adapted CLIP embeddings to inject high-level semantic and geographic priors directly into the 3D voxels. Furthermore, we introduce Weather-Aware Adaptive Fusion (WeathFusion), a dynamic gating mechanism that utilizes vehicle metadata and weather-conditioned prompts to re-weight sensor contributions based on real-time environmental reliability. To ensure structural consistency, a Depth-Aware Geometric Alignment (DAGA) loss is employed to align dense camera-derived geometry with sparse, spatially accurate LiDAR returns. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes and SemanticKITTI datasets demonstrate that our plug-and-play modules consistently enhance the performance of state-of-the-art voxel-based baselines. Notably, our approach achieves significant improvements in challenging weather scenarios, offering a scalable and robust solution for complex urban navigation.
tldr: The paper introduces VLMFusionOcc3D, a multimodal framework leveraging VLMs to improve 3D semantic occupancy prediction for autonomous driving, particularly in adverse weather conditions, using InstVLM, WeathFusion, and DAGA loss.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了VLMFusionOcc3D，一个多模态框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）来提高自动驾驶的3D语义占用预测，尤其是在恶劣天气条件下，使用了InstVLM、WeathFusion和DAGA损失。
summary_zh: 本文介绍 VLMFusionOcc3D，一个稳健的多模态框架，用于在自动驾驶中进行密集的 3D 语义占用预测。目前，基于体素的占用模型常常难以应对稀疏几何网格中的语义模糊性，并且在恶劣天气条件下性能会下降。为了解决这些挑战，我们利用视觉-语言模型 (VLMs) 丰富的语言先验知识，将模糊的体素特征锚定到稳定的语义概念。我们的框架从一个双分支特征提取流程开始，该流程将多视角图像和激光雷达点云投影到一个统一的体素空间中。我们提出实例驱动的 VLM 注意力机制 (InstVLM)，它利用门控交叉注意力和 LoRA 适配的 CLIP 嵌入，将高层次的语义和地理先验知识直接注入到 3D 体素中。此外，我们引入了天气感知自适应融合 (WeathFusion)，一种动态门控机制，它利用车辆元数据和天气条件下的提示来基于实时环境可靠性重新加权传感器贡献。为确保结构一致性，我们采用深度感知的几何对齐 (DAGA) 损失，将来自密集相机的几何结构与稀疏的、空间精度高的激光雷达返回对齐。在 nuScenes 和 SemanticKITTI 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的即插即用模块能够持续提升最先进的基于体素的基线模型的性能。值得注意的是，我们的方法在具有挑战性的天气场景中取得了显著的改进，为复杂的城市导航提供了一个可扩展且稳健的解决方案。

title: LiteVLA-Edge: Quantized On-Device Multimodal Control for Embedded Robotics
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide a unified framework for perception, language conditioning, and action generation, but many existing systems remain difficult to deploy in embedded robotic settings because of their computational requirements and inference latency. In this paper, we present LiteVLA-Edge, a deployment-oriented VLA pipeline for fully on-device inference on Jetson Orin-class hardware. Our approach combines supervised image-to-action fine-tuning in FP32 with post-training 4-bit GGUF quantization and GPU-accelerated inference through the \texttt{llama.cpp} runtime. Under our deployment configuration, LiteVLA-Edge achieves a mean end-to-end latency of 150.5\,ms (approximately 6.6\,Hz) while operating entirely offline within a ROS~2-integrated perception--reasoning--action pipeline. Rather than introducing a new policy objective, our contribution is a practical systems path for executing compact multimodal control models locally on embedded hardware while preserving modular interfaces between perception, reasoning, and actuation. These results establish timing feasibility for reactive language-conditioned control and provide a reproducible baseline for future task-level evaluation of on-device VLAs in robotics.
tldr: The paper introduces LiteVLA-Edge, a quantized Vision-Language-Action pipeline for on-device inference on embedded robotics hardware, achieving 6.6Hz inference speed with ROS2 integration. The main contribution is a practical system for deploying compact multimodal control models locally.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LiteVLA-Edge，一个用于嵌入式机器人硬件上设备推理的量化视觉-语言-动作流水线，实现了6.6Hz的推理速度并集成了ROS2。其主要贡献是为在本地部署紧凑型多模态控制模型提供了一个实用的系统。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型为感知、语言调节和动作生成提供了一个统一的框架，但许多现有系统由于其计算需求和推理延迟，仍然难以部署在嵌入式机器人环境中。在本文中，我们提出了 LiteVLA-Edge，这是一个面向部署的 VLA 流水线，用于在 Jetson Orin 级别的硬件上进行完全的设备端推理。我们的方法结合了 FP32 中的监督图像到动作的微调，以及通过 \texttt{llama.cpp} 运行时进行的训练后 4 位 GGUF 量化和 GPU 加速推理。在我们的部署配置下，LiteVLA-Edge 实现了 150.5 毫秒的平均端到端延迟（约 6.6 赫兹），同时完全离线运行在 ROS~2 集成的感知-推理-动作流水线中。我们的贡献不是引入新的策略目标，而是在嵌入式硬件上本地执行紧凑型多模态控制模型的实用系统路径，同时保持感知、推理和驱动之间的模块化接口。这些结果确立了反应式语言调节控制的时间可行性，并为未来在机器人技术中对设备端 VLA 进行任务级评估提供了一个可复现的基线。

title: Give me scissors: Collision-Free Dual-Arm Surgical Assistive Robot for Instrument Delivery
summary: During surgery, scrub nurses are required to frequently deliver surgical instruments to surgeons, which can lead to physical fatigue and decreased focus. Robotic scrub nurses provide a promising solution that can replace repetitive tasks and enhance efficiency. Existing research on robotic scrub nurses relies on predefined paths for instrument delivery, which limits their generalizability and poses safety risks in dynamic environments. To address these challenges, we present a collision-free dual-arm surgical assistive robot capable of performing instrument delivery. A vision-language model is utilized to automatically generate the robot's grasping and delivery trajectories in a zero-shot manner based on surgeons' instructions. A real-time obstacle minimum distance perception method is proposed and integrated into a unified quadratic programming framework. This framework ensures reactive obstacle avoidance and self-collision prevention during the dual-arm robot's autonomous movement in dynamic environments. Extensive experimental validations demonstrate that the proposed robotic system achieves an 83.33% success rate in surgical instrument delivery while maintaining smooth, collision-free movement throughout all trials. The project page and source code are available at https://give-me-scissors.github.io/.
tldr: This paper introduces a collision-free dual-arm surgical assistive robot that uses a vision-language model for zero-shot instrument delivery based on surgeon instructions, demonstrating an 83.33% success rate.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种防碰撞的双臂手术辅助机器人，它使用视觉语言模型，根据外科医生的指令进行零样本的器械递送，成功率达到83.33%。
summary_zh: 在外科手术中，巡回护士需要频繁地向外科医生递送手术器械，这会导致身体疲劳和注意力下降。机器人巡回护士提供了一种有前景的解决方案，可以替代重复性任务并提高效率。现有的机器人巡回护士研究依赖于预定义的器械递送路径，这限制了它们的泛化能力，并在动态环境中构成安全风险。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种能够执行器械递送的无碰撞双臂手术辅助机器人。利用视觉-语言模型，基于外科医生的指令，以零样本的方式自动生成机器人的抓取和递送轨迹。提出了一种实时障碍物最小距离感知方法，并将其集成到一个统一的二次规划框架中。该框架确保了双臂机器人在动态环境中自主运动期间的反应性避障和自身碰撞预防。大量的实验验证表明，所提出的机器人系统在手术器械递送中实现了 83.33% 的成功率，同时在所有试验中保持平稳、无碰撞的运动。项目页面和源代码可在 https://give-me-scissors.github.io/ 找到。

title: Learning Object-Centric Spatial Reasoning for Sequential Manipulation in Cluttered Environments
summary: Robotic manipulation in cluttered environments presents a critical challenge for automation. Recent large-scale, end-to-end models demonstrate impressive capabilities but often lack the data efficiency and modularity required for retrieving objects in dense clutter. In this work, we argue for a paradigm of specialized, decoupled systems and present Unveiler, a framework that explicitly separates high-level spatial reasoning from low-level action execution. Unveiler's core is a lightweight, transformer-based Spatial Relationship Encoder (SRE) that sequentially identifies the most critical obstacle for removal. This discrete decision is then passed to a rotation-invariant Action Decoder for execution. We demonstrate that this decoupled architecture is not only more computationally efficient in terms of parameter count and inference time, but also significantly outperforms both classic end-to-end policies and modern, large-model-based baselines in retrieving targets from dense clutter. The SRE is trained in two stages: imitation learning from heuristic demonstrations provides sample-efficient initialization, after which PPO fine-tuning enables the policy to discover removal strategies that surpass the heuristic in dense clutter. Our results, achieving up to 97.6\% success in partially occluded and 90.0\% in fully occluded scenarios in simulation, make a case for the power of specialized, object-centric reasoning in complex manipulation tasks. Additionally, we demonstrate that the SRE's spatial reasoning transfers zero-shot to real scenes, and validate the full system on a physical robot requiring only geometric workspace calibration; no learned components are retrained.
tldr: The paper introduces Unveiler, a decoupled robotic manipulation framework utilizing a transformer-based Spatial Relationship Encoder (SRE) to efficiently remove obstacles and retrieve target objects in cluttered environments, demonstrating superior performance and zero-shot transfer to real scenes.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种解耦机器人操作框架Unveiler，它利用基于Transformer的空间关系编码器(SRE)来高效地移除障碍物并检索混乱环境中的目标物体，展示了卓越的性能和零样本迁移到真实场景的能力。
summary_zh: 在杂乱环境中进行的机器人操作是自动化领域的一项关键挑战。 近期的大规模端到端模型展示出了令人印象深刻的能力，但通常缺乏在密集杂乱环境中检索物体所需的数据效率和模块化。 在这项工作中，我们认为专业化的、解耦的系统范式具有优势，并提出了Unveiler，一个明确将高级空间推理与低级动作执行分离的框架。 Unveiler的核心是一个轻量级的、基于Transformer的空间关系编码器（SRE），它按顺序识别用于移除的最关键障碍物。 这一离散决策随后被传递给一个旋转不变的动作解码器以执行动作。 我们证明，这种解耦的架构不仅在参数数量和推理时间方面更具计算效率，而且在从密集杂乱环境中检索目标方面，显著优于经典的端到端策略以及基于现代大型模型的基线方法。 SRE分两个阶段进行训练：首先通过模仿学习启发式演示来提供样本高效的初始化，之后使用近端策略优化（PPO）进行微调，使得策略能够在密集杂乱环境中发现超越启发式的移除策略。 我们的结果表明，在模拟环境中，部分遮挡场景下成功率高达97.6%，完全遮挡场景下成功率高达90.0%，这证明了专业化的、以物体为中心的空间推理在复杂操作任务中的强大能力。 此外，我们还证明了SRE的空间推理能够零样本迁移到真实场景，并在真实机器人上验证了整个系统，仅需几何工作空间校准，无需重新训练任何学习到的组件。

title: What Capable Agents Must Know: Selection Theorems for Robust Decision-Making under Uncertainty
summary: As artificial agents become increasingly capable, what internal structure is *necessary* for an agent to act competently under uncertainty? Classical results show that optimal control can be *implemented* using belief states or world models, but not that such representations are required. We prove quantitative "selection theorems" showing that low *average-case regret* on structured families of action-conditioned prediction tasks forces an agent to implement a predictive, structured internal state. Our results cover stochastic policies, partial observability, and evaluation under task distributions, without assuming optimality, determinism, or access to an explicit model. Technically, we reduce predictive modeling to binary "betting" decisions and show that regret bounds limit probability mass on suboptimal bets, enforcing the predictive distinctions needed to separate high-margin outcomes. In fully observed settings, this yields approximate recovery of the interventional transition kernel; under partial observability, it implies necessity of belief-like memory and predictive state, addressing an open question in prior world-model recovery work.
tldr: This paper provides theoretical guarantees that competent agents acting under uncertainty *must* have a predictive and structured internal state, even without assuming optimality or explicit models, bridging the gap between optimal control implementation and representational necessity.
tldr_zh: 该论文提供了理论保证，表明在不确定性下行动的智能体*必须*具有预测性和结构化的内部状态，即使在不假设最优性或显式模型的情况下，弥合了最优控制实现和表征必要性之间的差距。
summary_zh: 随着人工智能体能力日益增强，对于一个智能体在不确定性下具备胜任能力的行为来说，什么样的内部结构是*必要的*？经典结果表明，最优控制可以用置信状态或世界模型来*实现*，但并非要求必须使用这些表征。我们证明了定量的“选择定理”，表明在结构化的动作条件预测任务族上实现低*平均情况遗憾*，会迫使智能体执行一个预测性的、结构化的内部状态。我们的结果涵盖随机策略、部分可观测性和任务分布下的评估，且不假设最优性、确定性或对显式模型的访问。在技术上，我们将预测建模简化为二元“投注”决策，并表明遗憾界限限制了次优投注上的概率质量，从而强制实施了区分高利润结果所需的预测性区分。在完全可观测的场景中，这产生了对干预转移核的近似恢复；在部分可观测性下，这意味着类置信记忆和预测性状态的必要性，解决了先前世界模型恢复工作中一个未解决的问题。

title: Safe Whole-Body Loco-Manipulation via Combined Model and Learning-based Control
summary: Simultaneous locomotion and manipulation enables robots to interact with their environment beyond the constraints of a fixed base. However, coordinating legged locomotion with arm manipulation, while considering safety and compliance during contact interaction remains challenging. To this end, we propose a whole-body controller that combines a model-based admittance control for the manipulator arm with a Reinforcement Learning (RL) policy for legged locomotion. The admittance controller maps external wrenches--such as those applied by a human during physical interaction--into desired end-effector velocities, allowing for compliant behavior. The velocities are tracked jointly by the arm and leg controllers, enabling a unified 6-DoF force response. The model-based design permits accurate force control and safety guarantees via a Reference Governor (RG), while robustness is further improved by a Kalman filter enhanced with neural networks for reliable base velocity estimation. We validate our approach in both simulation and hardware using the Unitree Go2 quadruped robot with a 6-DoF arm and wrist-mounted 6-DoF Force/Torque sensor. Results demonstrate accurate tracking of interaction-driven velocities, compliant behavior, and safe, reliable performance in dynamic settings.
tldr: The paper presents a whole-body controller for a quadruped robot with a manipulator arm, combining model-based admittance control for manipulation and reinforcement learning for locomotion achieving safe and compliant interaction. The approach is validated on hardware.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于带机械臂的四足机器人的全身控制器，结合了基于模型的导纳控制用于操作和强化学习用于运动，实现了安全和顺从的交互。 该方法已在硬件上得到验证。
summary_zh: 同步运动与操作使机器人能够与环境进行交互，而不受固定底座的限制。然而，在接触交互过程中协调腿部运动与机械臂操作，同时兼顾安全性和顺应性仍然具有挑战性。为此，我们提出了一种全身控制器，该控制器将基于模型的机械臂导纳控制与用于腿部运动的强化学习(RL)策略相结合。导纳控制器将外部力/力矩（例如，人在物理交互过程中施加的力/力矩）映射为期望的末端执行器速度，从而实现顺应性行为。机械臂和腿部控制器共同跟踪这些速度，从而实现统一的6自由度力响应。基于模型的设计允许精确的力控制，并通过参考调控器(RG)提供安全保障，而鲁棒性则通过卡尔曼滤波器进一步提高，并通过神经网络增强，以实现可靠的基座速度估计。我们使用配备6自由度机械臂和腕部安装的6自由度力/力矩传感器的宇树Go2四足机器人，在仿真和硬件中验证了我们的方法。结果表明，在动态环境中，交互驱动的速度得到了精确跟踪，实现了顺应性行为以及安全可靠的性能。

title: Rethinking Camera Choice: An Empirical Study on Fisheye Camera Properties in Robotic Manipulation
summary: The adoption of fisheye cameras in robotic manipulation, driven by their exceptionally wide Field of View (FoV), is rapidly outpacing a systematic understanding of their downstream effects on policy learning. This paper presents the first comprehensive empirical study to bridge this gap, rigorously analyzing the properties of wrist-mounted fisheye cameras for imitation learning. Through extensive experiments in both simulation and the real world, we investigate three critical research questions: spatial localization, scene generalization, and hardware generalization. Our investigation reveals that: (1) The wide FoV significantly enhances spatial localization, but this benefit is critically contingent on the visual complexity of the environment. (2) Fisheye-trained policies, while prone to overfitting in simple scenes, unlock superior scene generalization when trained with sufficient environmental diversity. (3) While naive cross-camera transfer leads to failures, we identify the root cause as scale overfitting and demonstrate that hardware generalization performance can be improved with a simple Random Scale Augmentation (RSA) strategy. Collectively, our findings provide concrete, actionable guidance for the large-scale collection and effective use of fisheye datasets in robotic learning. More results and videos are available on https://robo-fisheye.github.io/
tldr: This paper empirically studies the impact of fisheye cameras on robotic manipulation imitation learning, finding benefits for spatial localization and scene generalization under specific conditions, and proposing Random Scale Augmentation for improved hardware generalization.
tldr_zh: 本文通过实验研究了鱼眼相机对机器人操作模仿学习的影响，发现在特定条件下，鱼眼相机有利于空间定位和场景泛化，并提出了随机尺度增强方法以提高硬件泛化能力。
summary_zh: 鱼眼相机因其极宽的视场角（FoV）在机器人操作中得到迅速应用，但对其下游策略学习的影响的系统性理解却滞后。本文首次提出了一项全面的经验研究来弥补这一差距，严格分析了手腕式鱼眼相机在模仿学习中的特性。通过在仿真和真实世界中的大量实验，我们研究了三个关键的研究问题：空间定位、场景泛化和硬件泛化。我们的调查发现：（1）宽视场角显著增强了空间定位能力，但这种优势严重依赖于环境的视觉复杂性。（2）鱼眼相机训练的策略虽然容易在简单场景中过拟合，但在使用足够的环境多样性进行训练时，可以实现卓越的场景泛化能力。（3）虽然直接的跨相机迁移会导致失败，但我们确定了根本原因是尺度过拟合，并证明了使用简单的随机尺度增强（RSA）策略可以提高硬件泛化性能。总而言之，我们的研究结果为大规模收集和有效利用鱼眼数据集进行机器人学习提供了具体的、可操作的指导。更多结果和视频请访问https://robo-fisheye.github.io/

title: Geometry-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Multi-view Consistent 3D Scene Editing
summary: Leveraging the priors of 2D diffusion models for 3D editing has emerged as a promising paradigm. However, maintaining multi-view consistency in edited results remains challenging, and the extreme scarcity of 3D-consistent editing paired data renders supervised fine-tuning (SFT), the most effective training strategy for editing tasks, infeasible. In this paper, we observe that, while generating multi-view consistent 3D content is highly challenging, verifying 3D consistency is tractable, naturally positioning reinforcement learning (RL) as a feasible solution. Motivated by this, we propose \textbf{RL3DEdit}, a single-pass framework driven by RL optimization with novel rewards derived from the 3D foundation model, VGGT. Specifically, we leverage VGGT's robust priors learned from massive real-world data, feed the edited images, and utilize the output confidence maps and pose estimation errors as reward signals, effectively anchoring the 2D editing priors onto a 3D-consistent manifold via RL. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RL3DEdit achieves stable multi-view consistency and outperforms state-of-the-art methods in editing quality with high efficiency. To promote the development of 3D editing, we will release the code and model.
tldr: The paper introduces RL3DEdit, a reinforcement learning framework leveraging a 3D foundation model (VGGT) for multi-view consistent 3D scene editing, addressing the scarcity of 3D-consistent editing paired data.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了RL3DEdit，一个利用3D基础模型(VGGT)进行多视角一致3D场景编辑的强化学习框架，解决了3D一致编辑配对数据稀缺的问题。
summary_zh: 利用二维扩散模型的先验知识进行三维编辑已经成为一种前景广阔的范式。然而，在编辑结果中保持多视图一致性仍然具有挑战性，且三维一致性编辑配对数据的极度稀缺使得监督式微调（SFT），作为编辑任务最有效的训练策略，变得不可行。在本文中，我们观察到，虽然生成多视图一致的三维内容极具挑战性，但验证三维一致性是可行的，这自然地将强化学习（RL）定位为一个可行的解决方案。受此启发，我们提出了 \textbf{RL3DEdit}，这是一个由强化学习优化驱动的单次框架，具有源自三维基础模型 VGGT 的新型奖励。具体而言，我们利用 VGGT 从大量真实世界数据中学习到的鲁棒先验知识，输入编辑后的图像，并利用输出置信度图和姿态估计误差作为奖励信号，通过强化学习有效地将二维编辑先验知识锚定到三维一致的流形上。大量实验表明，RL3DEdit 实现了稳定的多视图一致性，并在编辑质量上以高效率优于最先进的方法。为了促进三维编辑的发展，我们将发布代码和模型。

title: RAPO: Expanding Exploration for LLM Agents via Retrieval-Augmented Policy Optimization
summary: Agentic Reinforcement Learning (Agentic RL) has shown remarkable potential in large language model-based (LLM) agents. These works can empower LLM agents to tackle complex tasks via multi-step, tool-integrated reasoning. However, an inherent limitation of existing Agentic RL methods is their reliance on a pure on-policy paradigm for exploration, restricting exploration to the agent's self-generated outputs and preventing the discovery of new reasoning perspectives for further improvement. While recent efforts incorporate auxiliary off-policy signals to enhance exploration, they typically utilize full off-policy trajectories for trajectory-level policy estimation, overlooking the necessity for the fine-grained, step-level exploratory dynamics within agentic rollout. In this paper, we revisit exploration in Agentic RL and propose Retrieval-Augmented Policy Optimization (RAPO), a novel RL framework that introduces retrieval to explicitly expand exploration during training. To achieve this, we decompose the Agentic RL training process into two phases: (i) Hybrid-policy Agentic Rollout, and (ii) Retrieval-aware Policy Optimization. Specifically, we propose a Hybrid-policy Agentic Rollout strategy, which allows the agents to continuously reason over the retrieved off-policy step-level traces. It dynamically extends the reasoning receptive field of agents, enabling broader exploration conditioned on external behaviors. Subsequently, we introduce the Retrieval-aware Policy Optimization mechanism, which calibrates the policy gradient estimation with retrieval reward and importance shaping, stabilizing training and prioritizing retrieval-illuminating exploration. Extensive experiments show that RAPO achieves an +5.0% average gain on fourteen datasets across three agentic reasoning tasks, while delivering 1.2x faster training efficiency.
tldr: The paper introduces RAPO, a novel Reinforcement Learning framework for LLM agents that enhances exploration by integrating retrieval of off-policy traces into the training process, leading to improved performance and training efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为RAPO的新型LLM Agent强化学习框架，通过在训练过程中整合对离策略轨迹的检索来增强探索，从而提高性能和训练效率。
summary_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体强化学习（Agentic RL）已展现出卓越的潜力。这些研究能够赋予 LLM 智能体通过多步骤、工具集成推理来解决复杂任务的能力。然而，现有 Agentic RL 方法的一个内在限制是它们依赖于纯粹的在策略范式进行探索，这限制了探索范围，使其仅限于智能体自身生成的输出，并阻碍了发现新的推理视角以进行进一步改进。虽然最近的研究尝试引入辅助性的离策略信号来增强探索，但它们通常使用完整的离策略轨迹进行轨迹级别的策略估计，忽略了 Agentic Rollout中细粒度的、步骤级别的探索性动态的必要性。在本文中，我们重新审视了 Agentic RL 中的探索问题，并提出了一种检索增强的策略优化（Retrieval-Augmented Policy Optimization, RAPO），这是一个新颖的 RL 框架，它引入了检索来显式地扩展训练期间的探索范围。为了实现这一点，我们将 Agentic RL 训练过程分解为两个阶段：（i）混合策略 Agentic Rollout，以及（ii）检索感知的策略优化。具体来说，我们提出了一种混合策略 Agentic Rollout 策略，该策略允许智能体持续地推理关于检索到的离策略步骤级轨迹。它动态地扩展了智能体的推理感受野，从而实现了基于外部行为的更广泛的探索。随后，我们引入了检索感知的策略优化机制，该机制通过检索奖励和重要性重塑来校准策略梯度估计，从而稳定训练并优先考虑检索所启发的探索。广泛的实验表明，RAPO 在三个 Agentic 推理任务的十四个数据集上实现了平均 +5.0% 的增益，同时提供了 1.2 倍更快的训练效率。

title: TikZilla: Scaling Text-to-TikZ with High-Quality Data and Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist scientists across diverse workflows. A key challenge is generating high-quality figures from textual descriptions, often represented as TikZ programs that can be rendered as scientific images. Prior research has proposed a variety of datasets and modeling approaches for this task. However, existing datasets for Text-to-TikZ are too small and noisy to capture the complexity of TikZ, causing mismatches between text and rendered figures. Moreover, prior approaches rely solely on supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which does not expose the model to the rendered semantics of the figure, often resulting in errors such as looping, irrelevant content, and incorrect spatial relations. To address these issues, we construct DaTikZ-V4, a dataset more than four times larger and substantially higher in quality than DaTikZ-V3, enriched with LLM-generated figure descriptions. Using this dataset, we train TikZilla, a family of small open-source Qwen models (3B and 8B) with a two-stage pipeline of SFT followed by reinforcement learning (RL). For RL, we leverage an image encoder trained via inverse graphics to provide semantically faithful reward signals. Extensive human evaluations with over 1,000 judgments show that TikZilla improves by 1.5-2 points over its base models on a 5-point scale, surpasses GPT-4o by 0.5 points, and matches GPT-5 in the image-based evaluation, while operating at much smaller model sizes. Code, data, and models will be made available.
tldr: The paper introduces TikZilla, a family of small language models, trained on a new, large, high-quality dataset (DaTikZ-V4) using supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning, achieving state-of-the-art results in text-to-TikZ generation, even surpassing GPT-4o.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了 TikZilla，一种小型的语言模型系列，该模型使用监督微调和强化学习在新的、大型、高质量的数据集 (DaTikZ-V4) 上进行训练，在文本到 TikZ 生成方面取得了最先进的结果，甚至超越了 GPT-4o。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型(LLMs)正日益广泛地应用于辅助科学家完成各种工作流程。一个关键挑战是从文本描述中生成高质量的科研图像，文本描述通常用可渲染成科研图像的 TikZ 程序表示。先前的研究已经为该任务提出了各种数据集和建模方法。然而，现有的 Text-to-TikZ 数据集规模过小且噪声过多，无法捕捉 TikZ 的复杂性，导致文本和渲染图像之间出现不匹配。 此外，先前的方法仅依赖于监督微调(SFT)，这无法使模型接触到图像的渲染语义，经常导致循环、无关内容和不正确的空间关系等错误。 为了解决这些问题，我们构建了 DaTikZ-V4，它的规模是 DaTikZ-V3 的四倍多，质量也显著提高，并用 LLM 生成的图像描述进行了丰富。 基于该数据集，我们训练了 TikZilla，这是一系列小型开源 Qwen 模型（3B 和 8B），采用两阶段流水线，即 SFT 之后进行强化学习(RL)。 对于 RL，我们利用通过逆向图形训练的图像编码器来提供语义上忠实的奖励信号。包含超过 1000 个判断的大量人工评估表明，TikZilla 在 5 分制评分标准上比其基础模型提高了 1.5-2 分，超越了 GPT-4o 0.5 分，并在基于图像的评估中与 GPT-5 持平，同时模型规模小得多。 代码、数据和模型将公开提供。

title: ShipTraj-R1: Reinforcing Ship Trajectory Prediction in Large Language Models via Group Relative Policy Optimization
summary: Recent advancements in reinforcement fine-tuning have significantly improved the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs). In particular, methods such as group relative policy optimization (GRPO) have demonstrated strong capabilities across various fields. However, applying LLMs to ship trajectory prediction remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we propose ShipTraj-R1, a novel LLM-based framework that reformulates ship trajectory prediction as a text-to-text generation problem. (1) We design a dynamic prompt containing trajectory information about conflicting ships to guide the model to achieve adaptive chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning. (2) We introduce a comprehensive rule-based reward mechanism to incentivize the reasoning format and prediction accuracy of the model. (3) Our ShipTraj-R1 is reinforced through the GRPO mechanism guided by domain-specific prompts and rewards, and utilizes the Qwen3 as the model backbone. Extensive experimental results on two complex and real-world maritime datasets show that the proposed ShipTraj-R1 achieves the least error compared with state-of-the-art deep learning and LLM-based baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces ShipTraj-R1, an LLM-based framework using Group Relative Policy Optimization to improve ship trajectory prediction by reformulating it as a text-to-text generation problem and incorporating rule-based rewards.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ShipTraj-R1，一个基于LLM的框架，它使用群体相对策略优化来改进船舶轨迹预测，通过将该问题重新定义为文本到文本的生成问题并结合基于规则的奖励。
summary_zh: 强化微调技术的最新进展显著提升了大型语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力。特别是，诸如群组相对策略优化（GRPO）之类的方法已在各个领域展现出强大的能力。然而，将LLMs应用于船舶轨迹预测的研究在很大程度上仍未被探索。在本文中，我们提出了ShipTraj-R1，一种新颖的基于LLM的框架，它将船舶轨迹预测重新定义为一个文本到文本的生成问题。(1) 我们设计了一个动态Prompt，其中包含关于冲突船只的轨迹信息，以引导模型实现自适应的思维链（CoT）推理。(2) 我们引入了一种全面的基于规则的奖励机制，以激励模型的推理格式和预测准确性。(3) 我们的ShipTraj-R1通过GRPO机制，在领域特定的Prompt和奖励的指导下进行强化，并利用Qwen3作为模型主干。在两个复杂且真实的海洋数据集上的大量实验结果表明，与最先进的深度学习和基于LLM的基线方法相比，所提出的ShipTraj-R1实现了最小的误差。

title: Next Embedding Prediction Makes World Models Stronger
summary: Capturing temporal dependencies is critical for model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) in partially observable, high-dimensional domains. We introduce NE-Dreamer, a decoder-free MBRL agent that leverages a temporal transformer to predict next-step encoder embeddings from latent state sequences, directly optimizing temporal predictive alignment in representation space. This approach enables NE-Dreamer to learn coherent, predictive state representations without reconstruction losses or auxiliary supervision. On the DeepMind Control Suite, NE-Dreamer matches or exceeds the performance of DreamerV3 and leading decoder-free agents. On a challenging subset of DMLab tasks involving memory and spatial reasoning, NE-Dreamer achieves substantial gains. These results establish next-embedding prediction with temporal transformers as an effective, scalable framework for MBRL in complex, partially observable environments.
tldr: The paper introduces NE-Dreamer, a decoder-free MBRL agent using a temporal transformer to predict next-step encoder embeddings, achieving strong performance in complex and partially observable environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了NE-Dreamer，一种无解码器的MBRL智能体，它使用时间Transformer来预测下一步的编码器嵌入，并在复杂和部分可观察的环境中取得了强大的性能。
summary_zh: 在部分可观测、高维领域中，捕获时间依赖性对于基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）至关重要。我们引入NE-Dreamer，一种无解码器的MBRL智能体，它利用时间Transformer根据潜在状态序列预测下一步编码器嵌入，直接在表征空间中优化时间预测对齐。这种方法使NE-Dreamer能够在没有重建损失或辅助监督的情况下学习连贯的、可预测的状态表征。在DeepMind Control Suite上，NE-Dreamer的表现与DreamerV3和领先的无解码器智能体相当或超出。在涉及记忆和空间推理的具有挑战性的DMLab任务子集上，NE-Dreamer取得了显著的提升。这些结果确立了使用时间Transformer进行下一步嵌入预测，是复杂、部分可观测环境中MBRL的一种有效且可扩展的框架。

title: ShareVerse: Multi-Agent Consistent Video Generation for Shared World Modeling
summary: This paper presents ShareVerse, a video generation framework enabling multi-agent shared world modeling, addressing the gap in existing works that lack support for unified shared world construction with multi-agent interaction. ShareVerse leverages the generation capability of large video models and integrates three key innovations: 1) A dataset for large-scale multi-agent interactive world modeling is built on the CARLA simulation platform, featuring diverse scenes, weather conditions, and interactive trajectories with paired multi-view videos (front/ rear/ left/ right views per agent) and camera data. 2) We propose a spatial concatenation strategy for four-view videos of independent agents to model a broader environment and to ensure internal multi-view geometric consistency. 3) We integrate cross-agent attention blocks into the pretrained video model, which enable interactive transmission of spatial-temporal information across agents, guaranteeing shared world consistency in overlapping regions and reasonable generation in non-overlapping regions. ShareVerse, which supports 49-frame large-scale video generation, accurately perceives the position of dynamic agents and achieves consistent shared world modeling.
tldr: ShareVerse is a video generation framework using multi-agent interactions for shared world modeling, involving a new dataset built on CARLA, a spatial concatenation strategy for multi-view consistency, and cross-agent attention for shared world consistency.
tldr_zh: ShareVerse是一个视频生成框架，利用多智能体交互进行共享世界建模，它包含一个基于CARLA的新数据集，一种用于多视角一致性的空间连接策略，以及用于共享世界一致性的跨智能体注意力机制。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种名为ShareVerse的视频生成框架，它支持多智能体共享世界建模，解决了现有工作在构建统一共享世界以及支持多智能体交互方面的不足。 ShareVerse利用大型视频模型的生成能力，并结合了三项关键创新：1）基于CARLA仿真平台构建了一个用于大规模多智能体交互世界建模的数据集，该数据集包含多样化的场景、天气状况以及交互轨迹，并配有多视角的视频（每个智能体的前/后/左/右视图）和相机数据。 2）我们提出了一种空间拼接策略，用于将独立智能体的四视角视频进行拼接，以建模更广阔的环境，并确保内部多视角几何一致性。 3）我们将跨智能体注意力模块集成到预训练视频模型中，从而实现跨智能体空间-时间信息的交互传输，保证重叠区域的共享世界一致性以及非重叠区域的合理生成。 ShareVerse支持49帧的大规模视频生成，能够准确感知动态智能体的位置，并实现一致的共享世界建模。

title: LLMs for High-Frequency Decision-Making: Normalized Action Reward-Guided Consistency Policy Optimization
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) form the cornerstone of sequential decision-making agent development, they have inherent limitations in high-frequency decision tasks. Existing research mainly focuses on discrete embodied decision scenarios with low-frequency and significant semantic differences in state space (e.g., household planning). These methods suffer from limited performance in high-frequency decision-making tasks, since high-precision numerical state information in such tasks undergoes frequent updates with minimal fluctuations, and exhibiting policy misalignment between the learned sub-tasks and composite tasks. To address these issues, this paper proposes Normalized Action Reward guided Consistency Policy Optimization (NAR-CP). 1) Our method first acquires predefined dense rewards from environmental feedback of candidate actions via reward functions, then completes reward shaping through normalization, and theoretically verifies action reward normalization does not impair optimal policy. 2) To reduce policy misalignment in composite tasks, we use LLMs to infer sub-observation candidate actions and generate joint policies, with consistency loss ensuring precise alignment between global semantic policies and sub-semantic policies. Experiments on UAV pursuit, a typical high-frequency task, show our method delivers superior performance on independent and composite tasks with excellent generalization to unseen tasks.
tldr: This paper introduces Normalized Action Reward guided Consistency Policy Optimization (NAR-CP) to improve LLM-based agents' performance in high-frequency decision-making tasks, addressing issues of state updates and policy misalignment. Experiments on UAV pursuit demonstrate superior performance and generalization.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了归一化动作奖励引导的一致性策略优化（NAR-CP）方法，旨在提升基于LLM的智能体在高频决策任务中的性能，解决了状态更新和策略错位的问题。在无人机追逐实验中表现出卓越的性能和泛化能力。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）是序贯决策智能体开发的基础，但在高频决策任务中固有局限性。现有研究主要集中于低频、状态空间语义差异显著的离散具身决策场景（如家庭规划）。由于高频决策任务中高精度数值状态信息频繁更新且波动极小，这些方法性能受限，导致学习到的子任务与复合任务之间存在策略不对齐。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种归一化动作奖励引导的一致性策略优化（NAR-CP）方法：1）我们的方法首先通过奖励函数从候选动作的环境反馈中获取预定义的密集奖励，然后通过归一化完成奖励塑造，并在理论上验证动作奖励归一化不会损害最优策略。2）为了减少复合任务中的策略不对齐，我们使用LLMs推断子观察候选动作并生成联合策略，并通过一致性损失确保全局语义策略与子语义策略之间的精确对齐。在典型的UAV追逐高频任务上的实验表明，我们的方法在独立和复合任务上均表现出卓越性能，并且对未见任务具有出色的泛化能力。

title: MASPOB: Bandit-Based Prompt Optimization for Multi-Agent Systems with Graph Neural Networks
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved great success in many real-world applications, especially the one serving as the cognitive backbone of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) to orchestrate complex workflows in practice. Since many deployment scenarios preclude MAS workflow modifications and its performance is highly sensitive to the input prompts, prompt optimization emerges as a more natural approach to improve its performance. However, real-world prompt optimization for MAS is impeded by three key challenges: (1) the need of sample efficiency due to prohibitive evaluation costs, (2) topology-induced coupling among prompts, and (3) the combinatorial explosion of the search space. To address these challenges, we introduce MASPOB (Multi-Agent System Prompt Optimization via Bandits), a novel sample-efficient framework based on bandits. By leveraging Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) to quantify uncertainty, the bandit framework balances exploration and exploitation, maximizing gains within a strictly limited budget. To handle topology-induced coupling, MASPOB integrates Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to capture structural priors, learning topology-aware representations of prompt semantics. Furthermore, it employs coordinate ascent to decompose the optimization into univariate sub-problems, reducing search complexity from exponential to linear. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that MASPOB achieves state-of-the-art performance, consistently outperforming existing baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces MASPOB, a bandit-based framework with GNNs, for sample-efficient prompt optimization in Multi-Agent Systems, addressing the challenges of evaluation costs, topology-induced coupling, and combinatorial search space.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MASPOB，一个基于bandit的框架，结合图神经网络，用于多智能体系统中高效的prompt优化，解决了评估成本高昂、拓扑结构耦合和组合搜索空间庞大的问题。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型(LLMs)已在许多现实应用中取得了巨大成功，特别是作为多智能体系统(MAS)的认知骨干，在实践中协调复杂的工作流程。由于许多部署场景排除了对MAS工作流程的修改，并且其性能对输入提示非常敏感，因此提示优化成为一种更自然的提高性能的方法。然而，现实世界中针对MAS的提示优化受到三个关键挑战的阻碍：（1）由于过高的评估成本，需要样本效率；（2）拓扑结构引起的提示之间的耦合；（3）搜索空间的组合爆炸。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了MASPOB（基于bandit的多智能体系统提示优化），这是一个基于bandit的新型样本高效框架。通过利用上限置信区间（UCB）来量化不确定性，bandit框架平衡了探索和利用，在严格的预算限制内最大化收益。为了处理拓扑结构引起的耦合，MASPOB集成了图神经网络（GNNs）来捕获结构先验，学习提示语义的拓扑感知表示。此外，它采用坐标上升法将优化分解为单变量子问题，将搜索复杂度从指数级降低到线性级。在各种基准测试中的大量实验表明，MASPOB实现了最先进的性能，始终优于现有的基线方法。

title: See and Remember: A Multimodal Agent for Web Traversal
summary: Autonomous web navigation requires agents to perceive complex visual environments and maintain long-term context, yet current Large Language Model (LLM) based agents often struggle with spatial disorientation and navigation loops. In this paper, we propose generally applicable V-GEMS(Visual Grounding and Explicit Memory System), a robust multimodal agent architecture designed for precise and resilient web traversal. Our agent integrates visual grounding to resolve ambiguous interactive elements and introduces an explicit memory stack with state tracking. This dual mechanism allows the agent to maintain a structured map of its traversal path, enabling valid backtracking and preventing cyclical failures in deep navigation tasks. We also introduce an updatable dynamic benchmark to rigorously evaluate adaptability. Experiments show V-GEMS significantly dominates the WebWalker baseline, achieving a substantial 28.7% performance gain. Code is available at https://github.com/Vaultttttttttttt/V-GEMS.
tldr: The paper introduces V-GEMS, a multimodal agent architecture for web traversal, which uses visual grounding and an explicit memory stack to improve navigation and prevent cyclical failures, outperforming the WebWalker baseline by 28.7%.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为V-GEMS的多模态Agent架构，用于网页导航。该架构利用视觉基础和显式记忆栈来改善导航并防止循环性失败，性能比WebWalker基线高出28.7%。
summary_zh: 自主网络导航要求智能体感知复杂的视觉环境并维护长期上下文，然而，当前基于大型语言模型（LLM）的智能体常常在空间迷失和导航循环中挣扎。在本文中，我们提出一种通用适应性强的V-GEMS（视觉定址与显式记忆系统），这是一种为精确且有弹性的网络遍历而设计的鲁棒的多模态智能体架构。我们的智能体集成视觉定址以解析歧义性的交互元素，并引入一个具有状态跟踪的显式记忆栈。这种双重机制允许智能体维护其遍历路径的结构化地图，从而实现有效的回溯并避免深度导航任务中的循环失败。我们还引入了一个可更新的动态基准，用以严格评估适应性。实验表明，V-GEMS显著优于WebWalker基线，实现了高达28.7%的性能提升。代码可在https://github.com/Vaultttttttttttt/V-GEMS获取。

title: AgentAssay: Token-Efficient Regression Testing for Non-Deterministic AI Agent Workflows
summary:
Autonomous AI agents are deployed at unprecedented scale, yet no principled methodology exists for
  verifying that an agent has not regressed after changes to its prompts, tools, models, or
  orchestration logic. We present AgentAssay, the first token-efficient framework for regression
  testing non-deterministic AI agent workflows, achieving 78-100% cost reduction while maintaining
  rigorous statistical guarantees. Our contributions include: (1) stochastic three-valued verdicts
  (PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE) grounded in hypothesis testing; (2) five-dimensional agent coverage metrics;
  (3) agent-specific mutation testing operators; (4) metamorphic relations for agent workflows; (5)
  CI/CD deployment gates as statistical decision procedures; (6) behavioral fingerprinting that maps
  execution traces to compact vectors, enabling multivariate regression detection; (7) adaptive budget
  optimization calibrating trial counts to behavioral variance; and (8) trace-first offline analysis
  enabling zero-cost testing on production traces. Experiments across 5 models (GPT-5.2, Claude Sonnet
  4.6, Mistral-Large-3, Llama-4-Maverick, Phi-4), 3 scenarios, and 7,605 trials demonstrate that
  behavioral fingerprinting achieves 86% detection power where binary testing has 0%, SPRT reduces
  trials by 78%, and the full pipeline achieves 100% cost savings through trace-first analysis.
  Implementation: 20,000+ lines of Python, 751 tests, 10 framework adapters.
tldr: AgentAssay is a token-efficient framework for regression testing non-deterministic AI agent workflows, significantly reducing costs while maintaining statistical guarantees; it uses techniques like behavioral fingerprinting and adaptive budget optimization.
tldr_zh: AgentAssay是一个token高效的框架，用于回归测试非确定性AI代理工作流程，在保持统计保证的同时显著降低成本；它使用了行为指纹识别和自适应预算优化等技术。
summary_zh: 自主人工智能代理正以前所未有的规模部署，然而，在对其提示、工具、模型或编排逻辑进行更改后，验证代理是否未退化，尚无原则性的方法。我们提出了AgentAssay，这是第一个用于回归测试非确定性人工智能代理工作流程的、具备token效率的框架，在保持严格统计保证的同时，实现了78-100%的成本降低。我们的贡献包括：（1）基于假设检验的随机三值裁决（通过/失败/不确定）；（2）五维代理覆盖率指标；（3）代理特定的变异测试算子；（4）代理工作流程的变形关系；（5）作为统计决策程序的CI/CD部署门；（6）行为指纹识别，将执行轨迹映射到紧凑向量，从而实现多元回归检测；（7）自适应预算优化，根据行为方差校准试验次数；以及（8）首先进行trace的离线分析，从而在生产trace上实现零成本测试。在5个模型（GPT-5.2、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Mistral-Large-3、Llama-4-Maverick、Phi-4）、3个场景和7,605次试验中进行的实验表明，行为指纹识别实现了86%的检测能力，而二元测试为0%，SPRT减少了78%的试验，完整的pipeline通过trace优先分析实现了100%的成本节约。实现：20,000多行Python代码，751个测试，10个框架适配器。

title: LiveAgentBench: Comprehensive Benchmarking of Agentic Systems Across 104 Real-World Challenges
summary: As large language models grow more capable, general AI agents have become increasingly prevalent in practical applications. However, existing benchmarks face significant limitations, failing to represent real-world user tasks accurately. To address this gap, we present LiveAgentBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 104 scenarios that reflect real user requirements. It is constructed from publicly sourced questions on social media and real-world products. Central to our approach is the Social Perception-Driven Data Generation (SPDG) method, a novel process we developed to ensure each question's real-world relevance, task complexity, and result verifiability. We evaluate various models, frameworks, and commercial products using LiveAgentBench, revealing their practical performance and identifying areas for improvement. This release includes 374 tasks, with 125 for validation and 249 for testing. The SPDG process enables continuous updates with fresh queries from real-world interactions.
tldr: LiveAgentBench, a new benchmark with 104 real-world scenarios derived from social media questions, is introduced to evaluate the performance of AI agents. The paper highlights limitations in existing benchmarks and uses a novel 'Social Perception-Driven Data Generation' method.
tldr_zh: LiveAgentBench是一个新的基准测试，包含104个源于社交媒体问题的真实世界场景，用于评估AI代理的性能。该论文强调了现有基准测试的局限性，并使用了一种名为“社交感知驱动数据生成”的新方法。
summary_zh: 随着大型语言模型能力日益增强，通用人工智能代理在实际应用中变得越来越普遍。然而，现有的基准测试面临着显著的局限性，无法准确地代表真实世界的用户任务。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了LiveAgentBench，一个包含104个场景的综合基准测试，反映了真实的用户需求。它由社交媒体和真实世界产品上的公开来源问题构建而成。我们方法的关键是社会感知驱动的数据生成（SPDG）方法，这是我们开发的一种新颖流程，旨在确保每个问题的真实世界相关性、任务复杂性和结果可验证性。我们使用LiveAgentBench评估了各种模型、框架和商业产品，揭示了它们的实际性能并确定了需要改进的领域。此次发布包含374个任务，其中125个用于验证，249个用于测试。SPDG流程能够通过来自真实世界互动的新鲜查询进行持续更新。

title: Through the Lens of Contrast: Self-Improving Visual Reasoning in VLMs
summary: Reasoning has emerged as a key capability of large language models. In linguistic tasks, this capability can be enhanced by self-improving techniques that refine reasoning paths for subsequent finetuning. However, extending these language-based self-improving approaches to vision language models (VLMs) presents a unique challenge:~visual hallucinations in reasoning paths cannot be effectively verified or rectified. Our solution starts with a key observation about visual contrast: when presented with a contrastive VQA pair, i.e., two visually similar images with synonymous questions, VLMs identify relevant visual cues more precisely. Motivated by this observation, we propose Visual Contrastive Self-Taught Reasoner (VC-STaR), a novel self-improving framework that leverages visual contrast to mitigate hallucinations in model-generated rationales. We collect a diverse suite of VQA datasets, curate contrastive pairs according to multi-modal similarity, and generate rationales using VC-STaR. Consequently, we obtain a new visual reasoning dataset, VisCoR-55K, which is then used to boost the reasoning capability of various VLMs through supervised finetuning. Extensive experiments show that VC-STaR not only outperforms existing self-improving approaches but also surpasses models finetuned on the SoTA visual reasoning datasets, demonstrating that the inherent contrastive ability of VLMs can bootstrap their own visual reasoning. Project at: https://github.com/zhiyupan42/VC-STaR.
tldr: This paper introduces Visual Contrastive Self-Taught Reasoner (VC-STaR), a self-improving framework for VLMs that leverages visual contrast to mitigate hallucinations and enhance reasoning, and creates a new reasoning dataset VisCoR-55K used for fine-tuning.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种视觉对比自学习推理器 (VC-STaR)，这是一个用于 VLM 的自改进框架，它利用视觉对比来减轻幻觉并增强推理能力，并创建了一个新的推理数据集 VisCoR-55K 用于微调。
