We infer part-level decomposition, articulation kinematics, and reconstruct an interactive 3D digital replica from a user-object interaction video and a start-state scan. We propose a dual-Gaussian scene representation that is learned from an initial 3DGS scan of the object and a video that shows the movement of separate parts. It uses motion cues to segment the object into parts and assign articulation joints. Subsequently, a robust, sequential RANSAC is employed to achieve part mobility analysis without any part-level structural priors, which clusters moving primitives into rigid parts and estimates kinematics while automatically determining the number of parts. The proposed approach separates the object into parts, each represented as a 3D Gaussian set, enabling high-quality rendering. Our approach yields higher quality part segmentation than previous methods, without prior knowledge. Extensive experimental analysis on both simple and complex objects validates the effectiveness and strong generalisation ability of our approach. Project page: https://haoai-1997.github.io/AiM/.
tldr: This paper presents a novel framework, Articulation in Motion (AiM), that infers part-level decomposition, articulation kinematics, and reconstructs 3D articulated objects from video and a start-state scan without requiring prior knowledge about the object's structure or number of parts.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新框架，即运动中的铰接 (AiM)，该框架可以从视频和初始状态扫描中推断出零件级分解、铰接运动学并重建 3D 铰接对象，而无需先验了解对象的结构或零件数量。
summary_zh: 铰接物体在日常生活中无处不在。我们的目标是实现高质量的重建、独立运动部件的分割和铰接分析。 近期方法分析两种不同的铰接状态并执行逐点零件分割，利用跨状态对应关系优化每个零件的铰接，但需要预先知道零件数量。 这种假设极大地限制了它们的应用和性能。当物体在两种状态下都不能清晰可见时，它们的鲁棒性会降低。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的框架，即运动中的铰接（AiM）。 我们从用户-物体交互视频和起始状态扫描中推断零件级分解、铰接运动学，并重建一个可交互的3D数字副本。 我们提出了一种双高斯场景表示，该表示从物体的初始3DGS扫描和一个显示各个零件运动的视频中学习。它使用运动线索将物体分割成零件并分配铰接关节。 随后，采用一种鲁棒的、连续的RANSAC算法来实现零件运动分析，无需任何零件级结构先验知识，该算法将运动基元聚类成刚性零件并估计运动学，同时自动确定零件数量。所提出的方法将物体分成多个零件，每个零件都表示为一个3D高斯集合，从而实现高质量渲染。与以往的方法相比，我们的方法无需先验知识即可产生更高质量的零件分割。 对简单和复杂物体进行的大量实验分析验证了我们方法的有效性和强大的泛化能力。项目网页：https://haoai-1997.github.io/AiM/。

title: SemGS: Feed-Forward Semantic 3D Gaussian Splatting from Sparse Views for Generalizable Scene Understanding
summary: Semantic understanding of 3D scenes is essential for robots to operate effectively and safely in complex environments. Existing methods for semantic scene reconstruction and semantic-aware novel view synthesis often rely on dense multi-view inputs and require scene-specific optimization, limiting their practicality and scalability in real-world applications. To address these challenges, we propose SemGS, a feed-forward framework for reconstructing generalizable semantic fields from sparse image inputs. SemGS uses a dual-branch architecture to extract color and semantic features, where the two branches share shallow CNN layers, allowing semantic reasoning to leverage textural and structural cues in color appearance. We also incorporate a camera-aware attention mechanism into the feature extractor to explicitly model geometric relationships between camera viewpoints. The extracted features are decoded into dual-Gaussians that share geometric consistency while preserving branch-specific attributes, and further rasterized to synthesize semantic maps under novel viewpoints. Additionally, we introduce a regional smoothness loss to enhance semantic coherence. Experiments show that SemGS achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets, while providing rapid inference and strong generalization capabilities across diverse synthetic and real-world scenarios.
tldr: SemGS is a feed-forward framework for semantic 3D scene reconstruction and novel view synthesis from sparse image inputs, using a dual-branch Gaussian Splatting approach with camera-aware attention and a regional smoothness loss to achieve state-of-the-art performance with strong generalization capabilities.
tldr_zh: SemGS是一个前馈框架，用于从稀疏图像输入中进行语义3D场景重建和新视角合成。它采用双分支高斯溅射方法，结合相机感知注意力机制和区域平滑损失，实现了最先进的性能和强大的泛化能力。
summary_zh: 对三维场景的语义理解对于机器人在复杂环境中有效且安全地操作至关重要。现有的语义场景重建和语义感知新视角合成方法通常依赖于密集的 多视角输入，并且需要针对特定场景的优化，这限制了它们在实际应用中的实用性和可扩展性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出 SemGS，一个用于从稀疏图像输入重建可泛化的语义场的正向馈送框架。 SemGS 使用双分支架构来提取颜色和语义特征，其中两个分支共享浅层 CNN 层，允许语义推理利用颜色外观中的纹理和结构线索。我们还在特征提取器中加入了一种相机感知注意力机制，以显式地建模相机视点之间的几何关系。提取的特征被解码成共享几何一致性的双高斯分布，同时保留特定分支的属性，并进一步光栅化以合成新视角下的语义图。此外，我们引入了区域平滑损失以增强语义一致性。实验表明，SemGS 在基准数据集上取得了最先进的性能，同时在各种合成和真实场景中提供了快速推理和强大的泛化能力。

title: OpenMarcie: Dataset for Multimodal Action Recognition in Industrial Environments
summary: Smart factories use advanced technologies to optimize production and increase efficiency. To this end, the recognition of worker activity allows for accurate quantification of performance metrics, improving efficiency holistically while contributing to worker safety. OpenMarcie is, to the best of our knowledge, the biggest multimodal dataset designed for human action monitoring in manufacturing environments. It includes data from wearables sensing modalities and cameras distributed in the surroundings. The dataset is structured around two experimental settings, involving a total of 36 participants. In the first setting, twelve participants perform a bicycle assembly and disassembly task under semi-realistic conditions without a fixed protocol, promoting divergent and goal-oriented problem-solving. The second experiment involves twenty-five volunteers (24 valid data) engaged in a 3D printer assembly task, with the 3D printer manufacturer's instructions provided to guide the volunteers in acquiring procedural knowledge. This setting also includes sequential collaborative assembly, where participants assess and correct each other's progress, reflecting real-world manufacturing dynamics. OpenMarcie includes over 37 hours of egocentric and exocentric, multimodal, and multipositional data, featuring eight distinct data types and more than 200 independent information channels. The dataset is benchmarked across three human activity recognition tasks: activity classification, open vocabulary captioning, and cross-modal alignment.
tldr: The paper introduces OpenMarcie, a large multimodal dataset for human action recognition in manufacturing environments, featuring wearable sensors, cameras, and two experiment settings: bicycle and 3D printer assembly. It benchmarks the dataset on activity classification, captioning, and cross-modal alignment tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OpenMarcie，一个用于制造业环境中人类行为识别的大型多模态数据集，包含可穿戴传感器、摄像头以及自行车和3D打印机组装两个实验场景。该数据集在活动分类、图像描述和跨模态对齐任务上进行了基准测试。
summary_zh: 智能工厂利用先进技术来优化生产和提高效率。为此，工人活动识别能够对性能指标进行精确量化，从而全面提高效率，同时也有助于工人安全。据我们所知，OpenMarcie 是专为制造业环境中人类行为监测而设计的最大规模的多模态数据集。它包括来自可穿戴传感设备和分布在周围环境中的摄像头的数据。该数据集围绕两个实验设置构建，共涉及 36 名参与者。在第一个设置中，十二名参与者在半真实条件下执行自行车组装和拆卸任务，没有固定的流程，鼓励发散和目标导向的问题解决。第二个实验涉及二十五名志愿者（24 个有效数据），他们参与 3D 打印机组装任务，并提供 3D 打印机制造商的说明，以指导志愿者获取程序性知识。此设置还包括顺序协作组装，参与者互相评估和纠正彼此的进度，反映了现实世界的制造动态。OpenMarcie 包括超过 37 小时的以自我中心和以外部视角获取的多模态、多位置数据，包含八种不同的数据类型和 200 多个独立的信息通道。该数据集在三个人类活动识别任务中进行了基准测试：活动分类、开放词汇描述和跨模态对齐。

title: Learning in Markov Decision Processes with Exogenous Dynamics
summary: Reinforcement learning algorithms are typically designed for generic Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), where any state-action pair can lead to an arbitrary transition distribution. In many practical systems, however, only a subset of the state variables is directly influenced by the agent's actions, while the remaining components evolve according to exogenous dynamics and account for most of the stochasticity. In this work, we study a structured class of MDPs characterized by exogenous state components whose transitions are independent of the agent's actions. We show that exploiting this structure yields significantly improved learning guarantees, with only the size of the exogenous state space appearing in the leading terms of the regret bounds. We further establish a matching lower bound, showing that this dependence is information-theoretically optimal. Finally, we empirically validate our approach across classical toy settings and real-world-inspired environments, demonstrating substantial gains in sample efficiency compared to standard reinforcement learning methods.
tldr: This paper introduces a structured MDP where some state components evolve exogenously and independently of the agent's actions, demonstrating improved learning guarantees and sample efficiency by exploiting this structure, both theoretically and empirically.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种结构化的MDP，其中一些状态分量以外生方式演化且独立于智能体的动作。通过利用这种结构，论文在理论和实验上证明了学习保证和样本效率的提升。
summary_zh: 强化学习算法通常被设计用于通用的马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，其中任何状态-动作对都可能导致任意的转移分布。然而，在许多实际系统中，只有一部分状态变量直接受到智能体动作的影响，而其余部分则根据外生动态演化，并占据了大部分随机性。在这项工作中，我们研究了一类具有结构化的 MDP，其特征在于外生状态分量的转移独立于智能体的动作。我们表明，利用这种结构可以显著提高学习保证，只有外生状态空间的大小出现在后悔界的主要项中。我们进一步建立了一个匹配的下界，表明这种依赖在信息论上是最优的。最后，我们在经典的玩具环境和受现实世界启发的环境中对我们的方法进行了经验验证，证明与标准强化学习方法相比，样本效率有了显著提高。

title: Post Hoc Extraction of Pareto Fronts for Continuous Control
summary: Agents in the real world must often balance multiple objectives, such as speed, stability, and energy efficiency in continuous control. To account for changing conditions and preferences, an agent must ideally learn a Pareto frontier of policies representing multiple optimal trade-offs. Recent advances in multi-policy multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) enable learning a Pareto front directly, but require full multi-objective consideration from the start of training. In practice, multi-objective preferences often arise after a policy has already been trained on a single specialised objective. Existing MORL methods cannot leverage these pre-trained `specialists' to learn Pareto fronts and avoid incurring the sample costs of retraining. We introduce Mixed Advantage Pareto Extraction (MAPEX), an offline MORL method that constructs a frontier of policies by reusing pre-trained specialist policies, critics, and replay buffers. MAPEX combines evaluations from specialist critics into a mixed advantage signal, and weights a behaviour cloning loss with it to train new policies that balance multiple objectives. MAPEX's post hoc Pareto front extraction preserves the simplicity of single-objective off-policy RL, and avoids retrofitting these algorithms into complex MORL frameworks. We formally describe the MAPEX procedure and evaluate MAPEX on five multi-objective MuJoCo environments. Given the same starting policies, MAPEX produces comparable fronts at $0.001\%$ the sample cost of established baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces MAPEX, an offline MORL method to extract Pareto fronts by reusing pre-trained specialist policies, critics, and replay buffers, achieving comparable performance to existing methods with significantly lower sample costs.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为MAPEX的离线多目标强化学习方法，它通过复用预训练的专家策略、评论器以及回放缓存来提取帕累托前沿，以极低的样本成本实现了与现有方法相当的性能。
summary_zh: 真实世界中的智能体通常需要在连续控制中平衡多个目标，例如速度、稳定性以及能量效率。为了适应不断变化的环境和偏好，智能体理想情况下必须学习一个帕累托前沿的策略，代表多个最优的权衡。最近多策略多目标强化学习(MORL)的进展使得可以直接学习帕累托前沿，但这需要从训练一开始就充分考虑多目标。在实践中，多目标偏好通常是在针对单一特定目标训练策略之后才产生的。现有的MORL方法无法利用这些预训练的“专家”来学习帕累托前沿，并且无法避免重新训练所带来的样本成本。我们引入了混合优势帕累托提取(MAPEX)，一种离线MORL方法，通过重用预训练的专家策略、评论家和回放缓冲区来构建策略前沿。MAPEX将来自专家评论家的评估信息结合成一个混合优势信号，并使用该信号来加权行为克隆损失，从而训练新的平衡多个目标的策略。MAPEX的事后帕累托前沿提取保留了单目标离策略RL的简易性，并且避免了将这些算法改造到复杂MORL框架中。我们正式描述了MAPEX流程，并在五个多目标MuJoCo环境中评估了MAPEX。在给定相同起始策略的情况下，MAPEX产生的可比前沿的样本成本仅为现有基线的0.001%。

title: Heterogeneous Agent Collaborative Reinforcement Learning
summary: We introduce Heterogeneous Agent Collaborative Reinforcement Learning (HACRL), a new learning paradigm that addresses the inefficiencies of isolated on-policy optimization. HACRL enables collaborative optimization with independent execution: heterogeneous agents share verified rollouts during training to mutually improve, while operating independently at inference time. Unlike LLM-based multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), HACRL does not require coordinated deployment, and unlike on-/off-policy distillation, it enables bidirectional mutual learning among heterogeneous agents rather than one-directional teacher-to-student transfer. Building on this paradigm, we propose HACPO, a collaborative RL algorithm that enables principled rollout sharing to maximize sample utilization and cross-agent knowledge transfer. To mitigate capability discrepancies and policy distribution shifts, HACPO introduces four tailored mechanisms with theoretical guarantees on unbiased advantage estimation and optimization correctness. Extensive experiments across diverse heterogeneous model combinations and reasoning benchmarks show that HACPO consistently improves all participating agents, outperforming GSPO by an average of 3.3\% while using only half the rollout cost.
tldr: HACRL is a new RL paradigm enabling collaborative optimization among heterogeneous agents with independent execution, using rollout sharing and tailored mechanisms for improved sample efficiency and cross-agent knowledge transfer, achieving better performance than GSPO.
tldr_zh: HACRL是一种新的强化学习范例，允许具有独立执行能力的异构智能体之间的协同优化，通过共享rollout和定制机制来提高样本效率和跨智能体知识转移，其性能优于GSPO。
summary_zh: 我们引入异构智能体协作强化学习（HACRL），这是一种新的学习范式，旨在解决独立同轨策略优化中的低效问题。HACRL实现了独立执行的协作优化：异构智能体在训练期间共享验证后的轨迹数据以相互改进，同时在推理时独立运行。与基于大型语言模型的的多智能体强化学习（MARL）不同，HACRL不需要协调部署；与同/异轨策略蒸馏不同，它实现了异构智能体之间的双向互学习，而不是单向的教师到学生转移。基于此范式，我们提出了HACPO，一种协作强化学习算法，该算法实现了有原则的轨迹共享，以最大化样本利用率和跨智能体知识转移。为了缓解能力差异和策略分布偏移，HACPO引入了四种定制机制，并在无偏优势函数估计和优化正确性方面提供了理论保证。在各种异构模型组合和推理基准测试中进行的大量实验表明，HACPO始终能改进所有参与的智能体，与GSPO相比，平均性能提升了3.3%，而使用了仅一半计算量的轨迹数据。

title: Towards Parameter-Free Temporal Difference Learning
summary: Temporal difference (TD) learning is a fundamental algorithm for estimating value functions in reinforcement learning. Recent finite-time analyses of TD with linear function approximation quantify its theoretical convergence rate. However, they often require setting the algorithm parameters using problem-dependent quantities that are difficult to estimate in practice -- such as the minimum eigenvalue of the feature covariance (\(ω\)) or the mixing time of the underlying Markov chain (\(τ_{\text{mix}}\)). In addition, some analyses rely on nonstandard and impractical modifications, exacerbating the gap between theory and practice. To address these limitations, we use an exponential step-size schedule with the standard TD(0) algorithm. We analyze the resulting method under two sampling regimes: independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) sampling from the stationary distribution, and the more practical Markovian sampling along a single trajectory. In the i.i.d.\ setting, the proposed algorithm does not require knowledge of problem-dependent quantities such as \(ω\), and attains the optimal bias-variance trade-off for the last iterate. In the Markovian setting, we propose a regularized TD(0) algorithm with an exponential step-size schedule. The resulting algorithm achieves a comparable convergence rate to prior works, without requiring projections, iterate averaging, or knowledge of \(τ_{\text{mix}}\) or \(ω\).
tldr: This paper proposes a parameter-free Temporal Difference (TD) learning algorithm using an exponential step-size schedule, eliminating the need for problem-dependent parameter tuning in both i.i.d. and Markovian sampling regimes.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种使用指数步长调度的无参数时间差分 (TD) 学习算法，消除了在 i.i.d. 和马尔可夫采样方案中对问题依赖参数进行调整的需要。
summary_zh: 时间差分(TD)学习是强化学习中用于估计价值函数的一种基本算法。最近对带有线性函数近似的TD的有限时间分析量化了其理论收敛速度。然而，它们通常需要使用依赖于问题的量来设置算法参数，这些量在实践中难以估计 - 例如特征协方差的最小特征值(\(ω\))或底层马尔可夫链的混合时间(\(τ_{\text{mix}}\))。此外，一些分析依赖于非标准且不切实际的修改，加剧了理论与实践之间的差距。为了解决这些限制，我们对标准TD(0)算法使用指数步长策略。我们在两种采样机制下分析了该算法：来自平稳分布的独立同分布(i.i.d.)采样，以及沿单条轨迹的更实际的马尔可夫采样。在i.i.d.设置中，所提出的算法不需要知道诸如\(ω\)等依赖于问题的量，并针对最后一次迭代实现了最佳的偏差-方差权衡。在马尔可夫设置中，我们提出了一种具有指数步长策略的正则化TD(0)算法。所得到的算法实现了与先前工作相当的收敛速度，而无需投影、迭代平均或知道\(τ_{\text{mix}}\)或\(ω\)。

title: Wasserstein Proximal Policy Gradient
summary: We study policy gradient methods for continuous-action, entropy-regularized reinforcement learning through the lens of Wasserstein geometry. Starting from a Wasserstein proximal update, we derive Wasserstein Proximal Policy Gradient (WPPG) via an operator-splitting scheme that alternates an optimal transport update with a heat step implemented by Gaussian convolution. This formulation avoids evaluating the policy's log density or its gradient, making the method directly applicable to expressive implicit stochastic policies specified as pushforward maps. We establish a global linear convergence rate for WPPG, covering both exact policy evaluation and actor-critic implementations with controlled approximation error. Empirically, WPPG is simple to implement and attains competitive performance on standard continuous-control benchmarks.
tldr: The paper introduces Wasserstein Proximal Policy Gradient (WPPG), a policy gradient method for continuous control that leverages Wasserstein geometry, avoids log-density evaluations, and demonstrates global linear convergence with competitive performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 Wasserstein 近端策略梯度 (WPPG)，这是一种用于连续控制的策略梯度方法，它利用 Wasserstein 几何，避免了对数密度评估，并展示了具有竞争性能的全局线性收敛性。
summary_zh: 我们从Wasserstein几何的角度研究连续动作、熵正则化强化学习的策略梯度方法。从Wasserstein近端更新出发，我们通过一种算子分裂方案推导出Wasserstein近端策略梯度(WPPG)，该方案将最优传输更新与由高斯卷积实现的热核步交替进行。这种公式避免了评估策略的对数密度或其梯度，使得该方法可以直接应用于表示能力强的隐式随机策略，这些策略被指定为前推映射。我们建立了WPPG的全局线性收敛速度，涵盖了精确的策略评估以及具有可控近似误差的Actor-Critic实现。在经验方面，WPPG易于实现，并在标准连续控制基准测试中获得了具有竞争力的性能。

title: Robotic Grasping and Placement Controlled by EEG-Based Hybrid Visual and Motor Imagery
summary: We present a framework that integrates EEG-based visual and motor imagery (VI/MI) with robotic control to enable real-time, intention-driven grasping and placement. Motivated by the promise of BCI-driven robotics to enhance human-robot interaction, this system bridges neural signals with physical control by deploying offline-pretrained decoders in a zero-shot manner within an online streaming pipeline. This establishes a dual-channel intent interface that translates visual intent into robotic actions, with VI identifying objects for grasping and MI determining placement poses, enabling intuitive control over both what to grasp and where to place. The system operates solely on EEG via a cue-free imagery protocol, achieving integration and online validation. Implemented on a Base robotic platform and evaluated across diverse scenarios, including occluded targets or varying participant postures, the system achieves online decoding accuracies of 40.23% (VI) and 62.59% (MI), with an end-to-end task success rate of 20.88%. These results demonstrate that high-level visual cognition can be decoded in real time and translated into executable robot commands, bridging the gap between neural signals and physical interaction, and validating the flexibility of a purely imagery-based BCI paradigm for practical human-robot collaboration.
tldr: This paper presents a brain-computer interface (BCI) system using EEG to control a robot's grasping and placement actions based on visual and motor imagery. It achieves real-time control but with modest accuracy and success rates.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于脑电图的脑机接口（BCI）系统，通过视觉和运动想象来控制机器人的抓取和放置动作。该系统实现了实时控制，但准确率和成功率不高。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，将基于脑电（EEG）的视觉和运动想象（VI/MI）与机器人控制集成，从而实现实时、意图驱动的抓取和放置。受到脑机接口（BCI）驱动的机器人技术增强人机交互前景的启发，该系统通过在在线流式管道中以零样本方式部署离线预训练的解码器，将神经信号与物理控制连接起来。这建立了一个双通道意图接口，将视觉意图转化为机器人动作，其中VI识别用于抓取的物体，而MI确定放置姿势，从而实现对抓取对象和放置位置的直观控制。该系统仅通过无提示想象协议在脑电上运行，实现了集成和在线验证。该系统在Base机器人平台上实现，并在包括遮挡目标或不同参与者姿势等多种场景中进行了评估，在线解码准确率达到40.23%（VI）和62.59%（MI），端到端任务成功率为20.88%。这些结果表明，高层次视觉认知可以被实时解码并转化为可执行的机器人命令，弥合了神经信号与物理交互之间的差距，并验证了纯粹基于想象的BCI范例在实际人机协作中的灵活性。

title: PathSpace: Rapid continuous map approximation for efficient SLAM using B-Splines in constrained environments
summary:
Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) plays a crucial role in enabling autonomous vehicles to navigate previously unknown environments.
  Semantic SLAM mostly extends visual SLAM, leveraging the higher density information available to reason about the environment in a more human-like manner. This allows for better decision making by exploiting prior structural knowledge of the environment, usually in the form of labels. Current semantic SLAM techniques still mostly rely on a dense geometric representation of the environment, limiting their ability to apply constraints based on context. We propose PathSpace, a novel semantic SLAM framework that uses continuous B-splines to represent the environment in a compact manner, while also maintaining and reasoning through the continuous probability density functions required for probabilistic reasoning. This system applies the multiple strengths of B-splines in the context of SLAM to interpolate and fit otherwise discrete sparse environments. We test this framework in the context of autonomous racing, where we exploit pre-specified track characteristics to produce significantly reduced representations at comparable levels of accuracy to traditional landmark based methods and demonstrate its potential in limiting the resources used by a system with minimal accuracy loss.
tldr: The paper introduces PathSpace, a semantic SLAM framework using B-splines for efficient map representation in constrained environments, demonstrating its effectiveness in autonomous racing by reducing resource consumption with minimal accuracy loss.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为PathSpace的语义SLAM框架，该框架使用B样条在受限环境中进行高效的地图表示。该框架在自主赛车中得到了验证，通过减少资源消耗且几乎不损失精度，展现了其有效性。
summary_zh: 同步定位与地图构建(SLAM)在使自动驾驶车辆能够在先前未知的环境中导航方面起着至关重要的作用。语义SLAM主要扩展了视觉SLAM，利用更高密度的信息，以更像人类的方式推理环境。这通过利用环境的先验结构知识（通常以标签的形式）来实现更好的决策。当前的语义SLAM技术仍然主要依赖于环境的密集几何表示，这限制了它们基于上下文应用约束的能力。我们提出PathSpace，一种新颖的语义SLAM框架，它使用连续B样条以紧凑的方式表示环境，同时维护和推理概率推理所需的连续概率密度函数。该系统在SLAM的背景下应用B样条的多种优势来插值和拟合原本离散的稀疏环境。我们在自动驾驶竞赛的背景下测试了该框架，其中我们利用预先指定的赛道特性来产生显著减少的表示，其精度与传统的基于地标的方法相当，并展示了其在以最小的精度损失限制系统所用资源方面的潜力。

title: Instant and Reversible Adhesive-free Bonding Between Silicones and Glossy Papers for Soft Robotics
summary: Integrating silicone with non-extensible materials is a common strategy used in the fabrication of fluidically-driven soft actuators, yet conventional approaches often rely on irreversible adhesives or embedding processes that are labor-intensive and difficult to modify. This work presents silicone-glossy paper bonding (SGB), a rapid, adhesive-free, and solvent-reversible bonding approach that forms robust silicone-paper interfaces simply through contact. The SGB interface withstands high mechanical loads (shear strength > 61 kPa) and can be fully detached and reassembled via ethanol immersion without loss of performance, enabling component reuse and rapid redesign. Characterization studies indicate that surface functional groups primarily govern adhesion on the glossy paper and the modulus of the silicone, while durability and environmental response clarify the conditions for reversible debonding. The results further suggest a synergistic interaction of hydrogen bonding and oligomer diffusion, yielding strong yet reconfigurable adhesion. Soft actuators fabricated using SGB design exhibit equal or greater performance compared to conventional embedded-layer design and enable programmable actuation modes, including contraction, bending, and twisting. By simplifying fabrication while supporting reuse and rapid iteration, SGB offers a scalable and sustainable platform for rapid prototyping in soft robotics.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel, adhesive-free, and reversible bonding method (SGB) for silicone and glossy paper, enabling rapid prototyping and reconfigurable soft robotics.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新型的、无粘合剂的、可逆的硅胶和光面纸粘合方法（SGB），从而实现快速原型设计和可重构的软体机器人。
summary_zh: 将硅酮与不可拉伸材料结合是流体驱动软体驱动器制造中常用的策略，但传统方法通常依赖于不可逆的粘合剂或嵌入工艺，这些工艺既费力又难以修改。 本文提出了一种硅酮-光面纸粘合（SGB）技术，这是一种快速、无粘合剂且溶剂可逆的粘合方法，仅通过接触即可形成坚固的硅酮-纸界面。 SGB界面可承受高机械载荷（剪切强度> 61 kPa），并且可以通过乙醇浸泡进行完全分离和重新组装，而不会损失性能，从而实现组件的重复使用和快速重新设计。 表征研究表明，表面官能团主要控制光面纸和硅酮模量上的粘附力，耐久性和环境响应则阐明了可逆解键的条件。 结果进一步表明氢键和低聚物扩散协同作用，产生强大且可重构的粘附力。 采用SGB设计制造的软体驱动器相比传统嵌入层设计表现出同等或更高的性能，并实现了可编程的驱动模式，包括收缩、弯曲和扭转。 通过简化制造流程，同时支持重复使用和快速迭代，SGB为软体机器人领域的快速原型设计提供了一个可扩展且可持续的平台。

title: Diffusion-MPC in Discrete Domains: Feasibility Constraints, Horizon Effects, and Critic Alignment: Case study with Tetris
summary: We study diffusion-based model predictive control (Diffusion-MPC) in discrete combinatorial domains using Tetris as a case study. Our planner samples candidate placement sequences with a MaskGIT-style discrete denoiser and selects actions via reranking. We analyze three key factors: (1) feasibility-constrained sampling via logit masking over valid placements, (2) reranking strategies using a heuristic score, a pretrained DQN critic, and a hybrid combination, and (3) compute scaling in candidate count and planning horizon. We find that feasibility masking is necessary in discrete domains, removing invalid action mass (46%) and yielding a 6.8% improvement in score and 5.6% improvement in survival over unconstrained sampling. Naive DQN reranking is systematically misaligned with rollout quality, producing high decision regret (mean 17.6, p90 36.6). Shorter planning horizons outperform longer ones under sparse and delayed rewards, suggesting uncertainty compounding in long imagined rollouts. Overall, compute choices (K, H) determine dominant failure modes: small K limits candidate quality, while larger H amplifies misranking and model mismatch. Our findings highlight structural challenges of diffusion planners in discrete environments and provide practical diagnostics for critic integration.
tldr: This paper explores Diffusion-MPC in discrete domains, specifically Tetris, analyzing feasibility constraints, reranking strategies with DQN critics, and planning horizon effects. It identifies challenges and provides diagnostics for critic integration in such environments.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了离散域中的基于扩散的模型预测控制（Diffusion-MPC），以俄罗斯方块为例，分析了可行性约束、使用DQN评论器的重排序策略以及规划范围的影响。它指出了其中的挑战，并为在这种环境中进行评论器集成提供了诊断方法。
summary_zh: 我们研究了基于扩散模型的模型预测控制（Diffusion-MPC）在离散组合域中的应用，以俄罗斯方块游戏为例进行研究。我们的规划器使用 MaskGIT 风格的离散去噪器对候选放置序列进行采样，并通过重排序来选择动作。我们分析了三个关键因素：（1）通过对有效放置进行 logits 掩码，实现可行性约束采样；（2）使用启发式分数、预训练 DQN 评论家以及混合组合等重排序策略；（3）候选数量和规划范围的计算规模。我们发现，在离散域中，可行性掩码是必要的，它可以消除无效动作质量（46%），并在分数上产生 6.8% 的提升，在生存率上产生 5.6% 的提升，优于无约束采样。朴素的 DQN 重排序与 rollout 质量系统性地不对齐，导致高决策后悔值（平均 17.6，p90 为 36.6）。在稀疏和延迟奖励下，较短的规划范围优于较长的规划范围，表明在长时间的想象 rollout 中存在不确定性复合。总而言之，计算选择 (K, H) 决定了主要的失效模式：小的 K 限制了候选质量，而大的 H 则放大了误排序和模型不匹配。我们的研究结果突出了扩散规划器在离散环境中的结构性挑战，并为评论家集成提供了实用的诊断方法。

title: Near-Optimal Regret for KL-Regularized Multi-Armed Bandits
summary: Recent studies have shown that reinforcement learning with KL-regularized objectives can enjoy faster rates of convergence or logarithmic regret, in contrast to the classical $\sqrt{T}$-type regret in the unregularized setting. However, the statistical efficiency of online learning with respect to KL-regularized objectives remains far from completely characterized, even when specialized to multi-armed bandits (MABs). We address this problem for MABs via a sharp analysis of KL-UCB using a novel peeling argument, which yields a $\tilde{O}(ηK\log^2T)$ upper bound: the first high-probability regret bound with linear dependence on $K$. Here, $T$ is the time horizon, $K$ is the number of arms, $η^{-1}$ is the regularization intensity, and $\tilde{O}$ hides all logarithmic factors except those involving $\log T$. The near-tightness of our analysis is certified by the first non-constant lower bound $Ω(ηK \log T)$, which follows from subtle hard-instance constructions and a tailored decomposition of the Bayes prior. Moreover, in the low-regularization regime (i.e., large $η$), we show that the KL-regularized regret for MABs is $η$-independent and scales as $\tildeΘ(\sqrt{KT})$. Overall, our results provide a thorough understanding of KL-regularized MABs across all regimes of $η$ and yield nearly optimal bounds in terms of $K$, $η$, and $T$.
tldr: This paper provides near-optimal regret bounds for KL-regularized Multi-Armed Bandits (MABs), deriving both upper and lower bounds across different regularization regimes and showing near-optimal performance relative to K, η, and T.
tldr_zh: 本文为KL正则化的多臂老虎机(MAB)提供了近乎最优的遗憾界限，推导了不同正则化状态下的上下界，并展示了相对于K、η和T的近乎最优的性能。
summary_zh: 最近的研究表明，使用KL散度正则化目标函数的强化学习可以获得更快的收敛速度或对数遗憾，这与非正则化设置中的经典$\sqrt{T}$型遗憾形成对比。然而，即使专门针对多臂老虎机问题（MABs），在线学习关于KL正则化目标的统计效率也远未完全得到表征。我们通过一种新颖的剥离论证对KL-UCB进行精细分析，从而解决了MABs的这个问题，得出了一个$\tilde{O}(ηK\log^2T)$的上界：这是第一个对臂数$K$呈线性依赖关系的高概率遗憾界。这里，$T$是时间范围，$K$是臂的数量，$η^{-1}$是正则化强度，$\tilde{O}$隐藏了除涉及$\log T$之外的所有对数因子。为了验证我们分析的近紧性，我们给出了首个非恒定的下界$Ω(ηK \log T)$，该下界来自精巧的困难实例构造和专门设计的贝叶斯先验分解。此外，在低正则化区域（即，大的$η$）中，我们表明 MABs 的 KL 正则化遗憾与$η$无关，并按$\tildeΘ(\sqrt{KT})$缩放。总而言之，我们的结果提供了对所有$η$范围内的KL正则化MABs的透彻理解，并在$K$、$η$和$T$方面产生了近乎最优的界限。

title: The Dresden Dataset for 4D Reconstruction of Non-Rigid Abdominal Surgical Scenes
summary: The D4D Dataset provides paired endoscopic video and high-quality structured-light geometry for evaluating 3D reconstruction of deforming abdominal soft tissue in realistic surgical conditions. Data were acquired from six porcine cadaver sessions using a da Vinci Xi stereo endoscope and a Zivid structured-light camera, registered via optical tracking and manually curated iterative alignment methods. Three sequence types - whole deformations, incremental deformations, and moved-camera clips - probe algorithm robustness to non-rigid motion, deformation magnitude, and out-of-view updates. Each clip provides rectified stereo images, per-frame instrument masks, stereo depth, start/end structured-light point clouds, curated camera poses and camera intrinsics. In postprocessing, ICP and semi-automatic registration techniques are used to register data, and instrument masks are created. The dataset enables quantitative geometric evaluation in both visible and occluded regions, alongside photometric view-synthesis baselines. Comprising over 300,000 frames and 369 point clouds across 98 curated recordings, this resource can serve as a comprehensive benchmark for developing and evaluating non-rigid SLAM, 4D reconstruction, and depth estimation methods.
tldr: The paper introduces the D4D Dataset, a comprehensive resource for evaluating 3D reconstruction of deforming abdominal soft tissue using paired endoscopic video and structured-light geometry from porcine cadaver surgical scenes.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 D4D 数据集，这是一个全面的资源，用于评估使用来自猪尸体手术场景的内窥镜视频和结构光几何配对的、可变形腹部软组织的 3D 重建。
summary_zh: D4D数据集提供了配对的内窥镜视频和高质量的结构光几何数据，用于评估在真实手术条件下腹部软组织变形的3D重建效果。数据来自六次猪胴体实验，使用达芬奇Xi立体内窥镜和Zivid结构光相机采集，通过光学跟踪和手动迭代对齐方法进行配准。包含三种序列类型——整体变形、增量变形和移动相机片段——旨在探测算法对非刚性运动、变形幅度和视野外更新的鲁棒性。每个片段提供校正后的立体图像、每帧器械掩模、立体深度、起始/结束结构光点云、精心校准的相机位姿和相机内参。在后处理中，使用ICP和半自动配准技术来配准数据，并创建器械掩模。该数据集能够对可见和遮挡区域进行定量几何评估，并提供基于光度视图合成的基线。该资源包含超过30万帧和98个精心校准的记录中包含的369个点云，可作为开发和评估非刚性SLAM、4D重建和深度估计方法的综合基准。

title: Direct Reward Fine-Tuning on Poses for Single Image to 3D Human in the Wild
summary: Single-view 3D human reconstruction has achieved remarkable progress through the adoption of multi-view diffusion models, yet the recovered 3D humans often exhibit unnatural poses. This phenomenon becomes pronounced when reconstructing 3D humans with dynamic or challenging poses, which we attribute to the limited scale of available 3D human datasets with diverse poses. To address this limitation, we introduce DrPose, Direct Reward fine-tuning algorithm on Poses, which enables post-training of a multi-view diffusion model on diverse poses without requiring expensive 3D human assets. DrPose trains a model using only human poses paired with single-view images, employing a direct reward fine-tuning to maximize PoseScore, which is our proposed differentiable reward that quantifies consistency between a generated multi-view latent image and a ground-truth human pose. This optimization is conducted on DrPose15K, a novel dataset that was constructed from an existing human motion dataset and a pose-conditioned video generative model. Constructed from abundant human pose sequence data, DrPose15K exhibits a broader pose distribution compared to existing 3D human datasets. We validate our approach through evaluation on conventional benchmark datasets, in-the-wild images, and a newly constructed benchmark, with a particular focus on assessing performance on challenging human poses. Our results demonstrate consistent qualitative and quantitative improvements across all benchmarks. Project page: https://seunguk-do.github.io/drpose.
tldr: The paper introduces DrPose, a direct reward fine-tuning method for improving 3D human reconstruction from single images by addressing unnatural poses, especially in dynamic scenarios, using a novel PoseScore reward and a new dataset, DrPose15K.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了DrPose，一种直接奖励微调方法，旨在通过解决不自然的姿势，特别是动态场景中的姿势，改进从单张图像重建3D人体的问题。该方法利用了新的PoseScore奖励和新的数据集DrPose15K。
summary_zh: 单视图3D人体重建通过采用多视角扩散模型取得了显著进展，然而，重建得到的3D人体常常呈现不自然的姿势。当重建具有动态或挑战性姿势的3D人体时，这种现象尤为明显，我们将其归因于具有多样姿势的可用3D人体数据集规模有限。为了解决这一限制，我们引入了DrPose，一种基于姿势的直接奖励微调算法，它能够在不需要昂贵的3D人体资产的情况下，对多视角扩散模型进行多样姿势的后训练。DrPose 仅使用与单视图图像配对的人体姿势来训练模型，采用直接奖励微调来最大化PoseScore，这是我们提出的可微奖励，用于量化生成的多视角潜在图像与真实人体姿势之间的一致性。这种优化是在DrPose15K上进行的，这是一个从现有人体运动数据集和姿势条件视频生成模型构建的新数据集。DrPose15K由丰富的人体姿势序列数据构建而成，与现有的3D人体数据集相比，展现出更广泛的姿势分布。我们通过在传统基准数据集、野外图像以及新构建的基准上进行的评估来验证我们的方法，特别关注评估在具有挑战性的人体姿势上的性能。我们的结果表明，在所有基准上均实现了持续的定性和定量改进。项目主页：https://seunguk-do.github.io/drpose。

title: Neural Electromagnetic Fields for High-Resolution Material Parameter Reconstruction
summary: Creating functional Digital Twins, simulatable 3D replicas of the real world, is a central challenge in computer vision. Current methods like NeRF produce visually rich but functionally incomplete twins. The key barrier is the lack of underlying material properties (e.g., permittivity, conductivity). Acquiring this information for every point in a scene via non-contact, non-invasive sensing is a primary goal, but it demands solving a notoriously ill-posed physical inversion problem. Standard remote signals, like images and radio frequencies (RF), deeply entangle the unknown geometry, ambient field, and target materials. We introduce NEMF, a novel framework for dense, non-invasive physical inversion designed to build functional digital twins. Our key insight is a systematic disentanglement strategy. NEMF leverages high-fidelity geometry from images as a powerful anchor, which first enables the resolution of the ambient field. By constraining both geometry and field using only non-invasive data, the original ill-posed problem transforms into a well-posed, physics-supervised learning task. This transformation unlocks our core inversion module: a decoder. Guided by ambient RF signals and a differentiable layer incorporating physical reflection models, it learns to explicitly output a continuous, spatially-varying field of the scene's underlying material parameters. We validate our framework on high-fidelity synthetic datasets. Experiments show our non-invasive inversion reconstructs these material maps with high accuracy, and the resulting functional twin enables high-fidelity physical simulation. This advance moves beyond passive visual replicas, enabling the creation of truly functional and simulatable models of the physical world.
tldr: The paper introduces NEMF, a framework for reconstructing material properties of 3D scenes using images and RF signals to create functional digital twins, enabling high-fidelity physical simulations.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了NEMF，一个利用图像和射频信号重建3D场景材料属性的框架，以创建功能性数字孪生，从而实现高保真的物理仿真。
summary_zh: 创建功能性的数字孪生体，即现实世界的可仿真3D复制品，是计算机视觉领域的核心挑战。目前的方法，如NeRF，可以生成视觉效果丰富的孪生体，但在功能上并不完整。关键障碍是缺乏潜在的材料属性（例如，介电常数、电导率）。通过非接触、非侵入式的传感方式获取场景中每个点的这些信息是一个主要目标，但它需要解决一个众所周知的病态物理反演问题。诸如图像和射频（RF）等标准遥感信号，将未知的几何形状、环境场和目标材料深度地纠缠在一起。我们介绍了一种名为NEMF的新型框架，用于密集、非侵入式的物理反演，旨在构建功能性的数字孪生体。我们的主要见解是一种系统的解耦策略。NEMF利用来自图像的高保真几何信息作为强大的锚点，首先实现对环境场的解析。通过仅使用非侵入性数据约束几何形状和场，原始的病态问题转化为一个适定、物理监督的学习任务。这种转变解锁了我们的核心反演模块：一个解码器。在环境射频信号和包含物理反射模型的可微层的指导下，该解码器学习显式地输出场景底层材料参数的连续、空间变化的场信息。我们在高保真合成数据集上验证了我们的框架。实验表明，我们的非侵入式反演能够以高精度重建这些材料分布图，并且由此产生的功能孪生体能够实现高保真的物理仿真。这一进步超越了被动的视觉复制品，实现了对物理世界真正具有功能性且可仿真的模型的创建。

title: EIMC: Efficient Instance-aware Multi-modal Collaborative Perception
summary: Multi-modal collaborative perception calls for great attention to enhancing the safety of autonomous driving. However, current multi-modal approaches remain a ``local fusion to communication'' sequence, which fuses multi-modal data locally and needs high bandwidth to transmit an individual's feature data before collaborative fusion. EIMC innovatively proposes an early collaborative paradigm. It injects lightweight collaborative voxels, transmitted by neighbor agents, into the ego's local modality-fusion step, yielding compact yet informative 3D collaborative priors that tighten cross-modal alignment. Next, a heatmap-driven consensus protocol identifies exactly where cooperation is needed by computing per-pixel confidence heatmaps. Only the Top-K instance vectors located in these low-confidence, high-discrepancy regions are queried from peers, then fused via cross-attention for completion. Afterwards, we apply a refinement fusion that involves collecting the top-K most confident instances from each agent and enhancing their features using self-attention. The above instance-centric messaging reduces redundancy while guaranteeing that critical occluded objects are recovered. Evaluated on OPV2V and DAIR-V2X, EIMC attains 73.01\% AP@0.5 while reducing byte bandwidth usage by 87.98\% compared with the best published multi-modal collaborative detector. Code publicly released at https://github.com/sidiangongyuan/EIMC.
tldr: The paper proposes EIMC, an efficient instance-aware multi-modal collaborative perception method for autonomous driving that reduces bandwidth usage by performing early collaboration and instance-centric messaging, achieving significant performance improvements on OPV2V and DAIR-V2X datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了EIMC，一种高效的实例感知多模态协同感知方法，用于自动驾驶。通过执行早期协同和实例中心的信息传递，减少了带宽使用，并在OPV2V和DAIR-V2X数据集上实现了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 多模态协同感知对于增强自动驾驶的安全性至关重要。然而，当前的多模态方法仍然采用“局部融合后通信”的流程，即在本地融合多模态数据，并需要高带宽来传输个体的特征数据，然后才能进行协同融合。EIMC创新性地提出了一种早期协同范式。它将邻近智能体传输的轻量级协同体素注入到自我的本地模态融合步骤中，从而产生紧凑而信息丰富的3D协同先验，以加强跨模态对齐。接下来，一种热图驱动的共识协议通过计算每像素置信度热图来精确定位需要合作的位置。仅从对等方查询位于这些低置信度、高差异区域的Top-K个实例向量，然后通过交叉注意力进行融合以完成补全。之后，我们应用一种精炼融合，该融合涉及收集来自每个智能体的Top-K个最自信的实例，并使用自注意力增强它们的特征。上述以实例为中心的消息传递减少了冗余，同时保证了关键的遮挡对象得以恢复。在OPV2V和DAIR-V2X上的评估表明，与已发表的最佳多模态协同检测器相比，EIMC在将字节带宽使用量降低87.98%的同时，达到了73.01%的AP@0.5。代码已在https://github.com/sidiangongyuan/EIMC 上公开发布。

title: DINOv3 Visual Representations for Blueberry Perception Toward Robotic Harvesting
summary: Vision Foundation Models trained via large-scale self-supervised learning have demonstrated strong generalization in visual perception; however, their practical role and performance limits in agricultural settings remain insufficiently understood. This work evaluates DINOv3 as a frozen backbone for blueberry robotic harvesting-related visual tasks, including fruit and bruise segmentation, as well as fruit and cluster detection. Under a unified protocol with lightweight decoders, segmentation benefits consistently from stable patch-level representations and scales with backbone size. In contrast, detection is constrained by target scale variation, patch discretization, and localization compatibility. The failure of cluster detection highlights limitations in modeling relational targets defined by spatial aggregation. Overall, DINOv3 is best viewed not as an end-to-end task model, but as a semantic backbone whose effectiveness depends on downstream spatial modeling aligned with fruit-scale and aggregation structures, providing guidance for blueberry robotic harvesting. Code and dataset will be available upon acceptance.
tldr: This paper evaluates DINOv3 as a frozen backbone for blueberry robotic harvesting visual tasks, finding it effective for segmentation but limited by spatial modeling challenges in detection, especially for clusters.
tldr_zh: 本文评估了 DINOv3 作为蓝莓机器人采摘视觉任务的冻结骨干网络，发现它在分割方面有效，但在检测（尤其是对于集群）中受到空间建模挑战的限制。
summary_zh: 通过大规模自监督学习训练的视觉基础模型已在视觉感知方面展现出强大的泛化能力；然而，它们在农业环境中的实际作用和性能局限性仍然不够明确。本研究评估了DINOv3作为蓝莓机器人采摘相关视觉任务的冻结骨干网络，包括果实和瘀伤分割，以及果实和果簇检测。在采用轻量级解码器且统一的协议下，分割任务始终受益于稳定的块级表征，并随着骨干网络规模的增加而性能提升。相比之下，检测任务受到目标尺度变化、块离散化以及定位兼容性的限制。果簇检测的失败突显了在建模由空间聚集定义的关联目标方面的局限性。总而言之，DINOv3最好被视为一种语义骨干网络，而非端到端的任务模型，其有效性取决于下游空间建模与果实尺度和聚集结构对齐的情况，从而为蓝莓机器人采摘提供指导。代码和数据集将在接收后公开。

title: TruckDrive: Long-Range Autonomous Highway Driving Dataset
summary: Safe highway autonomy for heavy trucks remains an open and unsolved challenge: due to long braking distances, scene understanding of hundreds of meters is required for anticipatory planning and to allow safe braking margins. However, existing driving datasets primarily cover urban scenes, with perception effectively limited to short ranges of only up to 100 meters. To address this gap, we introduce TruckDrive, a highway-scale multimodal driving dataset, captured with a sensor suite purpose-built for long range sensing: seven long-range FMCW LiDARs measuring range and radial velocity, three high-resolution short-range LiDARs, eleven 8MP surround cameras with varying focal lengths and ten 4D FMCW radars. The dataset offers 475 thousands samples with 165 thousands densely annotated frames for driving perception benchmarking up to 1,000 meters for 2D detection and 400 meters for 3D detection, depth estimation, tracking, planning and end to end driving over 20 seconds sequences at highway speeds. We find that state-of-the-art autonomous driving models do not generalize to ranges beyond 150 meters, with drops between 31% and 99% in 3D perception tasks, exposing a systematic long-range gap that current architectures and training signals cannot close.
tldr: The paper introduces TruckDrive, a new highway driving dataset with long-range sensor data and annotations designed to address the limitations of existing datasets for autonomous heavy trucks, revealing a significant performance gap for current models at long ranges.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TruckDrive，一个全新的高速公路驾驶数据集，具有远距离传感器数据和标注，旨在解决现有数据集在自动重型卡车方面的局限性，并揭示了当前模型在远距离上的显著性能差距。
summary_zh: 重型卡车在高速公路上的安全自动驾驶仍然是一个尚未解决的开放性挑战：由于制动距离较长，需要对数百米场景进行理解，以进行预测性规划并留出安全的制动裕量。然而，现有的驾驶数据集主要覆盖城市场景，感知范围有效限制在仅100米以内。为了弥补这一差距，我们推出了 TruckDrive，这是一个高速公路规模的多模态驾驶数据集，该数据集由专为远程感知而设计的传感器套件采集：七个远程 FMCW LiDAR，测量距离和径向速度，三个高分辨率短程 LiDAR，十一个具有不同焦距的 8MP 环绕摄像头，以及十个 4D FMCW 雷达。该数据集提供 47.5 万个样本，其中包含 16.5 万个密集标注的帧，用于高达 1000 米的 2D 检测和 400 米的 3D 检测、深度估计、跟踪、规划以及高速公路速度下超过 20 秒序列的端到端驾驶的驾驶感知基准测试。我们发现，最先进的自动驾驶模型无法泛化到 150 米以外的范围，在 3D 感知任务中下降幅度在 31% 到 99% 之间，这暴露了一个系统的远程差距，而当前的架构和训练信号无法弥合。

title: A Covering Framework for Offline POMDPs Learning using Belief Space Metric
summary: In off policy evaluation (OPE) for partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs), an agent must infer hidden states from past observations, which exacerbates both the curse of horizon and the curse of memory in existing OPE methods. This paper introduces a novel covering analysis framework that exploits the intrinsic metric structure of the belief space (distributions over latent states) to relax traditional coverage assumptions. By assuming value relevant functions are Lipschitz continuous in the belief space, we derive error bounds that mitigate exponential blow ups in horizon and memory length. Our unified analysis technique applies to a broad class of OPE algorithms, yielding concrete error bounds and coverage requirements expressed in terms of belief space metrics rather than raw history coverage. We illustrate the improved sample efficiency of this framework via case studies: the double sampling Bellman error minimization algorithm, and the memory based future dependent value functions (FDVF). In both cases, our coverage definition based on the belief space metric yields tighter bounds.
tldr: This paper introduces a covering analysis framework for off-policy evaluation in POMDPs, leveraging the belief space metric to mitigate the curse of horizon and memory by assuming Lipschitz continuity of value functions.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个用于POMDPs中离策略评估的覆盖分析框架，利用信念空间度量来缓解horizon和memory的难题，其假设价值函数在信念空间中具有Lipschitz连续性。
summary_zh: 在部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的离策略评估（OPE）中，智能体必须从过去的观测中推断隐藏状态，这加剧了现有OPE方法中的时间跨度诅咒和记忆诅咒。本文引入了一种新颖的覆盖分析框架，该框架利用信念空间（潜在状态上的分布）的内在度量结构来放宽传统的覆盖假设。通过假设与值相关的函数在信念空间中是利普希茨连续的，我们推导出误差界限，从而减轻了在时间跨度和记忆长度上的指数级增长。我们统一的分析技术适用于广泛的OPE算法，产生了具体的误差界限和覆盖要求，这些要求以信念空间度量而非原始历史覆盖来表示。我们通过案例研究说明了该框架改进的样本效率：双重采样的贝尔曼误差最小化算法和基于记忆的未来依赖值函数（FDVF）。在这两种情况下，我们基于信念空间度量的覆盖定义都产生了更紧的界限。

title: Personalized Multi-Agent Average Reward TD-Learning via Joint Linear Approximation
summary: We study personalized multi-agent average reward TD learning, in which a collection of agents interacts with different environments and jointly learns their respective value functions. We focus on the setting where there exists a shared linear representation, and the agents' optimal weights collectively lie in an unknown linear subspace. Inspired by the recent success of personalized federated learning (PFL), we study the convergence of cooperative single-timescale TD learning in which agents iteratively estimate the common subspace and local heads. We showed that this decomposition can filter out conflicting signals, effectively mitigating the negative impacts of ``misaligned'' signals, and achieving linear speedup. The main technical challenges lie in the heterogeneity, the Markovian sampling, and their intricate interplay in shaping error evolutions. Specifically, not only are the error dynamics of multiple variables closely interconnected, but there is also no direct contraction for the principal angle distance between the optimal subspace and the estimated subspace. We hope our analytical techniques can be useful to inspire research on deeper exploration into leveraging common structures. Experiments are provided to show the benefits of learning via a shared structure to the more general control problem.
tldr: This paper proposes a personalized multi-agent average reward TD-learning algorithm that leverages a shared linear representation to improve convergence speed and mitigate the negative impacts of misaligned signals in heterogeneous environments. It focuses on proving linear speedup via a cooperative single-timescale TD learning setting.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种个性化的多智能体平均奖励TD学习算法，该算法利用共享的线性表示来提高收敛速度，并减轻异构环境中错位信号的负面影响。 它侧重于通过协作式单时间尺度TD学习，证明线性加速。
summary_zh: 我们研究了个性化多智能体平均奖励时序差分学习，其中一群智能体与不同的环境交互，并共同学习各自的价值函数。我们关注存在共享线性表示的情况，并且智能体的最优权重集体位于一个未知的线性子空间中。受到最近个性化联邦学习（PFL）成功的启发，我们研究了合作式单时间尺度时序差分学习的收敛性，其中智能体迭代地估计公共子空间和局部头。我们证明了这种分解可以过滤掉冲突的信号，有效地减轻“未对齐”信号的负面影响，并实现线性加速。主要的技术挑战在于异质性、马尔可夫采样以及它们之间在塑造误差演化中的复杂相互作用。具体而言，不仅多个变量的误差动态密切相关，而且在最优子空间和估计子空间之间的主角度距离上也没有直接的收缩。我们希望我们的分析技术可以激发对利用公共结构进行深入探索的研究。实验结果表明，通过共享结构进行学习可以为更一般的控制问题带来好处。

title: Architectural HRI: Towards a Robotic Paradigm Shift in Human-Building Interaction
summary: Recent advances in sensing, communication, interfaces, control, and robotics are expanding Human-Building Interaction (HBI) beyond adaptive building services and facades toward the physical actuation of architectural space. In parallel, research in robotic furniture, swarm robotics, and shape-changing spaces shows that architectural elements can now be robotically augmented to move, reconfigure, and adapt space. We propose that these advances promise a paradigm shift in HBI, in which multiple building layers physically adapt in synchrony to support occupant needs and sustainability goals more holistically. Conversely, we argue that this emerging paradigm also provides an ideal case for transferring HRI knowledge to unconventional robotic morphologies, including the interpretation of the robot as multiple architectural layers or even as a building. However, this research agenda remains challenged by the temporal, spatial, and social complexity of architectural HRI, and by fragmented knowledge across HCI, environmental psychology, cognitive science, and architecture. We therefore call for interdisciplinary research that unifies the why, what, and how of robotic actuation in architectural forms.
tldr: This paper proposes a new paradigm called Architectural HRI, where buildings physically adapt to occupant needs using robotic actuation, advocating for interdisciplinary research to address its complexity and potential.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种名为建筑人机交互（Architectural HRI）的新范式，其中建筑物通过机器人驱动物理性地适应居住者的需求，并提倡跨学科研究以解决其复杂性和潜力。
summary_zh: 近年来，传感、通信、界面、控制和机器人技术的进步正将人-建筑交互（HBI）扩展到自适应建筑服务和立面之外，进而实现建筑空间的物理驱动。与此同时，机器人家具、集群机器人和变形空间的研究表明，建筑元素现在可以通过机器人进行增强，以移动、重新配置和适应空间。我们提出，这些进步预示着HBI的范式转变，其中多个建筑层以同步方式进行物理调整，从而更全面地支持居住者的需求和可持续性目标。反过来，我们认为这种新兴范式也为将人机交互（HRI）知识转移到非常规的机器人形态提供了一个理想的案例，包括将机器人解释为多个建筑层甚至一栋建筑物。然而，这种研究议程仍然面临着建筑HRI的时间、空间和社会复杂性的挑战，以及人机交互、环境心理学、认知科学和建筑学等领域知识的碎片化。因此，我们呼吁进行跨学科研究，以统一建筑形式中机器人驱动的“为什么”、“是什么”和“如何做”。

title: Multi-Agent-Based Simulation of Archaeological Mobility in Uneven Landscapes
summary: Understanding mobility, movement, and interaction in archaeological landscapes is essential for interpreting past human behavior, transport strategies, and spatial organization, yet such processes are difficult to reconstruct from static archaeological evidence alone. This paper presents a multi-agent-based modeling framework for simulating archaeological mobility in uneven landscapes, integrating realistic terrain reconstruction, heterogeneous agent modeling, and adaptive navigation strategies. The proposed approach combines global path planning with local dynamic adaptation, through reinforcment learning, enabling agents to respond efficiently to dynamic obstacles and interactions without costly global replanning. Real-world digital elevation data are processed into high-fidelity three-dimensional environments, preserving slope and terrain constraints that directly influence agent movement. The framework explicitly models diverse agent types, including human groups and animal-based transport systems, each parameterized by empirically grounded mobility characteristics such as load, slope tolerance, and physical dimensions. Two archaeological-inspired use cases demonstrate the applicability of the approach: a terrain-aware pursuit and evasion scenario and a comparative transport analysis involving pack animals and wheeled carts. The results highlight the impact of terrain morphology, visibility, and agent heterogeneity on movement outcomes, while the proposed hybrid navigation strategy provides a computationally efficient and interpretable solution for large-scale, dynamic archaeological simulations.
tldr: This paper presents a multi-agent simulation framework for modeling archaeological mobility in uneven terrains, using reinforcement learning for adaptive navigation with different agent types to analyze movement strategies.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个多智能体模拟框架，用于模拟考古环境中崎岖地形上的移动，利用强化学习进行自适应导航，结合不同类型的智能体，以分析其移动策略。
summary_zh: 理解考古景观中的移动性、运动和互动，对于解读过去人类的行为、运输策略和空间组织至关重要，然而仅凭静态的考古证据难以重建这些过程。本文提出了一个基于多智能体的建模框架，用于模拟不平坦地形中的考古移动性，该框架集成了真实地形重建、异构智能体建模以及自适应导航策略。提出的方法结合了全局路径规划和局部动态调整，通过强化学习，使智能体能够有效地响应动态障碍和互动，而无需进行昂贵的全局重规划。现实世界的数字高程数据被处理成高保真三维环境，保留了直接影响智能体运动的坡度和地形约束。该框架明确地模拟了多种智能体类型，包括人类群体和基于动物的运输系统，每种类型都由经验证实的移动性特征（如载重、坡度耐受性和物理尺寸）进行参数化。两个受考古启发的用例展示了该方法的适用性：一个是地形感知的追逐和躲避场景，另一个是涉及驮畜和带轮手推车的对比运输分析。结果突出了地形形态、可视性和智能体异质性对运动结果的影响，同时提出的混合导航策略为大规模、动态的考古模拟提供了一种计算效率高且可解释的解决方案。

title: MMH-Planner: Multi-Mode Hybrid Trajectory Planning Method for UAV Efficient Flight Based on Real-Time Spatial Awareness
summary: Motion planning is a critical component of intelligent unmanned systems, enabling their complex autonomous operations. However, current planning algorithms still face limitations in planning efficiency due to inflexible strategies and weak adaptability. To address this, this paper proposes a multi-mode hybrid trajectory planning method for UAVs based on real-time environmental awareness, which dynamically selects the optimal planning model for high-quality trajectory generation in response to environmental changes. First, we introduce a goal-oriented spatial awareness method that rapidly assesses flight safety in the upcoming environments. Second, a multi-mode hybrid trajectory planning mechanism is proposed, which can enhance the planning efficiency by selecting the optimal planning model for trajectory generation based on prior spatial awareness. Finally, we design a lazy replanning strategy that triggers replanning only when necessary to reduce computational resource consumption while maintaining flight quality. To validate the performance of the proposed method, we conducted comprehensive comparative experiments in simulation environments. Results demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithms across multiple metrics, achieving the best performance particularly in terms of the average number of planning iterations and computational cost per iteration. Furthermore, the effectiveness of our approach is further verified through real-world flight experiments integrated with a self-developed intelligent UAV platform.
tldr: The paper introduces a multi-mode hybrid trajectory planning method for UAVs based on real-time environmental awareness, improving planning efficiency and validated through simulations and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于实时环境感知的无人机多模混合轨迹规划方法，提高了规划效率，并通过仿真和实际飞行实验进行了验证。
summary_zh: 运动规划是智能无人系统的关键组成部分，使其能够执行复杂的自主操作。然而，当前的规划算法由于策略不够灵活和适应性较弱，在规划效率方面仍然面临局限性。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于实时环境感知的无人机多模态混合轨迹规划方法，该方法能够根据环境变化动态地选择最优的规划模型，从而生成高质量的轨迹。首先，我们引入了一种面向目标的空间感知方法，能够快速评估即将到来的环境中的飞行安全性。其次，提出了一种多模态混合轨迹规划机制，该机制可以通过基于先前空间感知选择最优的规划模型来提高规划效率。最后，我们设计了一种惰性重规划策略，仅在必要时触发重规划，从而在保持飞行质量的同时减少计算资源消耗。为了验证所提出方法的性能，我们在仿真环境中进行了全面的对比实验。结果表明，我们的方法在多个指标上优于现有的最先进（SOTA）算法，尤其是在平均规划迭代次数和每次迭代的计算成本方面表现最佳。此外，通过与我们自主研发的智能无人机平台集成的真实飞行实验进一步验证了我们方法的有效性。

title: Wukong-Omni: Design, Modeling and Control of a Multi-mode Robot for Air, Land, and Underwater Exploration with All-in-One Propulsion Unit
summary: In flood disaster rescue scenarios, partially submerged buildings prevent aerial robots from accessing lower levels, limiting mission effectiveness. To address this challenge, this paper presents Wukong-Omni, a novel multimode robot capable of operating across land, air, and underwater using a unified propulsion system. The system is enabled by an innovative mechanical design that allows motor reuse and improves thrust generation. Efficiency and peak thrust are enhanced through simulation and tank-based optimization. Experimental results show a 100 percent improvement in propulsion efficiency and a 150 percent increase in maximum thrust compared with direct installation methods. Dynamic models for the three operating domains are developed, and a unified cross-domain control framework is proposed. Comprehensive experiments validate stable locomotion and smooth transition across domains. Outdoor experiments further demonstrate robustness and adaptability in real-world environments.
tldr: Wukong-Omni is a multi-modal robot designed for land, air, and underwater operation using a unified propulsion system, demonstrated with improved efficiency and smooth cross-domain transitions.
tldr_zh: Wukong-Omni是一个多模态机器人，旨在通过统一的推进系统在陆地、空中和水下运行，实验证明其效率得到提高并实现了平稳的跨域转换。
summary_zh: 本文针对洪水灾害救援场景下，部分淹没建筑物阻碍空中机器人进入较低楼层，从而限制任务效率的问题，提出了一种新型多模态机器人Wukong-Omni，该机器人能够利用统一的推进系统在陆地、空中和水下环境中作业。这一系统得益于一项创新的机械设计，实现了电机复用并提高了推力产生效率。通过仿真和水箱优化，提高了推进效率和峰值推力。实验结果表明，与直接安装方式相比，推进效率提高了100%，最大推力增加了150%。本文建立了三种工作域的动力学模型，并提出了一种统一的跨域控制框架。综合实验验证了机器人稳定的运动能力和在不同域之间平滑过渡的能力。户外实验进一步证明了机器人在真实环境中的鲁棒性和适应性。

title: Tensegrity Robot Endcap-Ground Contact Estimation with Symmetry-aware Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network
summary: Tensegrity robots possess lightweight and resilient structures but present significant challenges for state estimation due to compliant and distributed ground contacts. This paper introduces a symmetry-aware heterogeneous graph neural network (Sym-HGNN) that infers contact states directly from proprioceptive measurements, including IMU and cable-length histories, without dedicated contact sensors. The network incorporates the robot's dihedral symmetry $D_3$ into the message-passing process to enhance sample efficiency and generalization. The predicted contacts are integrated into a state-of-the-art contact-aided invariant extended Kalman filter (InEKF) for improved pose estimation. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves up to 15% higher accuracy and 5% higher F1-score using only 20% of the training data compared to the CNN and MI-HGNN baselines, while maintaining low-drift and physically consistent state estimation results comparable to ground truth contacts. This work highlights the potential of fully proprioceptive sensing for accurate and robust state estimation in tensegrity robots. Code available at: https://github.com/Jonathan-Twz/Tensegrity-Sym-HGNN
tldr: This paper introduces a symmetry-aware heterogeneous graph neural network (Sym-HGNN) for contact state estimation in tensegrity robots, using only proprioceptive sensors, achieving improved pose estimation accuracy compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种对称感知异构图神经网络（Sym-HGNN），用于张拉整体机器人的接触状态估计，仅使用本体感受传感器，与基线方法相比，实现了更高的姿态估计精度。
summary_zh: 张拉整体机器人因其轻量化和弹性的结构而著称，但由于其柔顺和分布式的地面接触，给状态估计带来了重大挑战。本文提出了一种对称性感知的异构图神经网络（Sym-HGNN），该网络可以直接从本体感受测量值（包括IMU和缆绳长度历史记录）推断接触状态，而无需专门的接触传感器。该网络将机器人的二面体对称性$D_3$融入到消息传递过程中，从而提高样本效率和泛化能力。预测的接触状态被集成到最先进的接触辅助不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（InEKF）中，以改善姿态估计。仿真结果表明，与CNN和MI-HGNN基线相比，所提出的方法仅使用20%的训练数据，即可实现高达15%的精度提升和5%的F1分数提升，同时保持与真实接触状态相当的低漂移和物理一致的状态估计结果。这项工作突显了完全本体感受传感在张拉整体机器人中实现精确且鲁棒的状态估计的潜力。代码可在此处获取：https://github.com/Jonathan-Twz/Tensegrity-Sym-HGNN

title: A Robust Simulation Framework for Verification and Validation of Autonomous Maritime Navigation in Adverse Weather and Constrained Environments
summary: Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships (MASS) have emerged as a promising solution to enhance navigational safety, operational efficiency, and long-term cost effectiveness. However, their reliable deployment requires rigorous verification and validation (V\&V) under various environmental conditions, including extreme and safety-critical scenarios. This paper presents an enhanced virtual simulation framework to support the V\&V of MASS in realistic maritime environments, with particular emphasis on the influence of weather and bathymetry on autonomous navigation performance. The framework incorporates a high-fidelity environmental modeling suite capable of simulating adverse weather conditions such as rain, fog, and wave dynamics. The key factors that affect weather, such as rain and visibility, are parameterized to affect sea-state characteristics, perception, and sensing systems, resulting in position and velocity uncertainty, reduced visibility, and degraded situational awareness. Furthermore, high-resolution bathymetric data from major U.S. ports are integrated to enable depth-aware navigation, grounding prevention capabilities, and evaluation of vessel controllability in shallow or confined waterways. The proposed framework offers extensive configurability, enabling systematic testing in a wide spectrum of maritime conditions, including scenarios that are impractical or unsafe to replicate in real-world trials, thus supporting the V\&V of MASS.
tldr: This paper introduces a simulation framework for the verification and validation of Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships (MASS) under adverse weather and constrained environments using high-fidelity environmental modeling and bathymetric data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个仿真框架，用于在恶劣天气和受限环境下验证和确认海上自主水面舰艇 (MASS)，该框架使用高保真环境建模和测深数据。
summary_zh: 水面自主航行船舶（MASS）已成为提高航行安全、运行效率和长期成本效益的一种有前景的解决方案。然而，其可靠部署需要在各种环境条件下进行严格的验证和确认（V\&V），包括极端和安全攸关的场景。本文提出了一种增强型虚拟仿真框架，以支持MASS在真实海事环境中的V\&V，特别强调天气和水深地形对自主导航性能的影响。该框架包含一个高保真环境建模套件，能够模拟诸如雨、雾和波浪动力学等不利天气条件。影响天气的关键因素，如降雨和能见度，被参数化以影响海况特征、感知和传感系统，从而导致位置和速度不确定性、能见度降低以及情境感知能力下降。此外，集成了美国主要港口的高分辨率水深数据，以实现深度感知导航、预防搁浅能力以及评估船舶在浅水或限制水道中的可控性。所提出的框架提供了广泛的可配置性，能够在各种海事条件下进行系统测试，包括在现实世界试验中不切实际或不安全的场景，从而支持MASS的验证和确认。

title: COLREGs Compliant Collision Avoidance and Grounding Prevention for Autonomous Marine Navigation
summary: Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships (MASS) are increasingly regarded as a promising solution to address crew shortages, improve navigational safety, and improve operational efficiency in the maritime industry. Nevertheless, the reliable deployment of MASS in real-world environments remains a significant challenge, particularly in congested waters where the majority of maritime accidents occur. This emphasizes the need for safe and regulation-aware motion planning strategies for MASS that are capable of operating under dynamic maritime conditions. This paper presents a unified motion planning method for MASS that achieves real time collision avoidance, compliance with International Regulations for Preventing Collisions at Sea (COLREGs), and grounding prevention. The proposed work introduces a convex optimization method that integrates velocity obstacle-based (VO) collision constraints, COLREGs-based directional constraints, and bathymetry-based grounding constraints to generate computationally efficient, rule-compliant optimal velocity selection. To enhance robustness, the classical VO method is extended to consider uncertainty in the position and velocity estimates of the target vessel. Unnavigable shallow water regions obtained from bathymetric data, which are inherently nonconvex, are approximated via convex geometries using a integer linear programming (ILP), allowing grounding constraints to be incorporated into the motion planning. The resulting optimization generates optimal and dynamically feasible input velocities that meet collision avoidance, regulatory compliance, kinodynamic limits, and grounding prevention requirements. Simulation results involving multi-vessel encounters demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method in producing safe and regulation-compliant maneuvers, highlighting the suitability of the proposed approach for real time autonomous maritime navigation.
tldr: This paper proposes a convex optimization method for autonomous marine navigation that achieves real-time collision avoidance, COLREGs compliance, and grounding prevention by integrating velocity obstacle constraints, directional constraints, and bathymetry-based grounding constraints.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于自主船舶导航的凸优化方法，通过整合速度障碍约束、方向约束和基于测深法的接地约束，实现了实时避碰、COLREGs 合规和防搁浅。
summary_zh: 无人自主水面船舶(MASS)日益被认为是解决海员短缺、提高航行安全和提高海运业运营效率的有前景的方案。然而，在真实环境中可靠地部署MASS仍然是一个重大挑战，尤其是在海上事故发生频率最高的拥挤水域。这突显了对MASS安全且符合法规的运动规划策略的需求，这些策略能够在动态的海上条件下运行。本文提出了一种统一的MASS运动规划方法，该方法能够实现实时避碰、遵守《国际海上避碰规则》(COLREGs)以及防止搁浅。所提出的工作引入了一种凸优化方法，该方法集成了基于速度障碍(VO)的碰撞约束、基于COLREGs的方向约束和基于测深数据的搁浅约束，以生成计算高效、符合规则的最优速度选择。为了增强鲁棒性，传统的VO方法被扩展，以考虑目标船舶的位置和速度估计中的不确定性。利用整数线性规划(ILP)将从测深数据中获得的不可航行的浅水区域（本质上是非凸的）近似为凸几何体，从而可以将搁浅约束纳入运动规划中。由此产生的优化生成最优且动态可行的输入速度，满足避碰、法规遵从性、运动学约束和防止搁浅的要求。涉及多船相遇的仿真结果表明，所提出的方法在产生安全且符合规则的操纵方面是有效的，突出了所提出的方法适用于实时自主海上导航。

title: A Novel Modular Cable-Driven Soft Robotic Arm with Multi-Segment Reconfigurability
summary: This paper presents a novel, modular, cable-driven soft robotic arm featuring multi-segment reconfigurability. The proposed architecture enables a stackable system with independent segment control, allowing scalable adaptation to diverse structural and application requirements. The system is fabricated from soft silicone material and incorporates embedded tendon-routing channels with a protective dual-helical tendon structure. Experimental results showed that modular stacking substantially expanded the reachable workspace: relative to the single-segment arm, the three-segment configuration achieved up to a 13-fold increase in planar workspace area and a 38.9-fold increase in workspace volume. Furthermore, this study investigated the effect of silicone stiffness on actuator performance. The results revealed a clear trade-off between compliance and stiffness: softer silicone improved bending flexibility, while stiffer silicone improved structural rigidity and load-bearing stability. These results highlight the potential of stiffness tuning to balance compliance and strength for configuring scalable, reconfigurable soft robotic arms.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel modular, cable-driven soft robotic arm with multi-segment reconfigurability, demonstrating significant workspace expansion and exploring the trade-off between silicone stiffness and actuator performance. The arm is designed for scalable adaptation to diverse applications.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型的模块化、缆绳驱动的软体机器人手臂，具有多段可重构性，展示了显著的工作空间扩展，并探讨了硅胶刚度和执行器性能之间的权衡。该手臂旨在以可扩展的方式适应各种应用。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新型的、模块化的、绳索驱动的软体机械臂，其特点是具有多段可重构性。所提出的架构实现了一种可堆叠系统，具有独立的段控制，从而能够根据不同的结构和应用需求进行可扩展的适应。该系统由柔软的硅胶材料制成，并包含嵌入式肌腱布线通道和保护性的双螺旋肌腱结构。实验结果表明，模块化堆叠显著扩大了可达工作空间：相对于单段机械臂，三段配置将平面工作区面积最大扩展了13倍，工作区体积扩展了38.9倍。此外，本研究还探讨了硅胶刚度对执行器性能的影响。结果揭示了顺应性和刚度之间存在明显的权衡：较软的硅胶提高了弯曲灵活性，而较硬的硅胶提高了结构刚度和承载稳定性。这些结果突出了刚度调节在平衡顺应性和强度方面的潜力，可用于配置可扩展的、可重构的软体机械臂。

title: Learning Therapist Policy from Therapist-Exoskeleton-Patient Interaction
summary: Post-stroke rehabilitation is often necessary for patients to regain proper walking gait. However, the typical therapy process can be exhausting and physically demanding for therapists, potentially reducing therapy intensity, duration, and consistency over time. We propose a Patient-Therapist Force Field (PTFF) to visualize therapist responses to patient kinematics and a Synthetic Therapist (ST) machine learning model to support the therapist in dyadic robot-mediated physical interaction therapy. The first encodes patient and therapist stride kinematics into a shared low-dimensional latent manifold using a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) and models their interaction through a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM), which learns a probabilistic vector field mapping patient latent states to therapist responses. This representation visualizes patient-therapist interaction dynamics to inform therapy strategies and robot controller design. The latter is implemented as a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network trained on patient-therapist interaction data to predict therapist-applied joint torques from patient kinematics. Trained and validated using leave-one-out cross-validation across eight post-stroke patients, the model was integrated into a ROS-based exoskeleton controller to generate real-time torque assistance based on predicted therapist responses. Offline results and preliminary testing indicate the potential of their use as an alternative approach to post-stroke exoskeleton therapy. The PTFF provides understanding of the therapist's actions while the ST frees the human therapist from the exoskeleton, allowing them to continuously monitor the patient's nuanced condition.
tldr: This paper introduces a Patient-Therapist Force Field (PTFF) and a Synthetic Therapist (ST) using VAE, GMM, and LSTM to model therapist-patient interaction during post-stroke rehabilitation, aiming to provide robotic exoskeleton assistance and free the therapist for continuous patient monitoring.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种患者-治疗师力场 (PTFF) 和一个合成治疗师 (ST)，它们使用 VAE、GMM 和 LSTM 来建模中风后康复期间治疗师与患者的互动，旨在提供机器人外骨骼辅助并使治疗师能够持续监测患者。
summary_zh: 卒中后患者通常需要进行康复治疗以恢复正常的步态。然而，典型的治疗过程对于治疗师来说通常会非常疲惫和耗费体力，这可能会随着时间的推移降低治疗强度、持续时间和一致性。我们提出一种患者-治疗师力场（PTFF）来可视化治疗师对患者运动学响应，以及一种合成治疗师（ST）机器学习模型，以支持治疗师在二元机器人辅助物理互动治疗中的工作。前者使用变分自编码器(VAE)将患者和治疗师的步态运动学编码到共享的低维潜在流形中，并通过高斯混合模型(GMM)对他们的互动进行建模，该模型学习一种概率向量场，将患者潜在状态映射到治疗师的响应。这种表示方法可视化了患者-治疗师的互动动态，从而为制定治疗策略和机器人控制器设计提供信息。后者被实现为一个长短期记忆(LSTM)网络，该网络在患者-治疗师互动数据上进行训练，从而从患者运动学数据中预测治疗师施加的关节扭矩。该模型通过对八名卒中后患者进行留一法交叉验证进行训练和验证，并被集成到基于ROS的外骨骼控制器中，以基于预测的治疗师响应生成实时扭矩辅助。离线结果和初步测试表明，它们有潜力作为卒中后外骨骼治疗的替代方法。PTFF提供了对治疗师行为的理解，而ST将人类治疗师从外骨骼中解放出来，使其能够持续监测患者的细微状况。

title: Learning Memory-Enhanced Improvement Heuristics for Flexible Job Shop Scheduling
summary: The rise of smart manufacturing under Industry 4.0 introduces mass customization and dynamic production, demanding more advanced and flexible scheduling techniques. The flexible job-shop scheduling problem (FJSP) has attracted significant attention due to its complex constraints and strong alignment with real-world production scenarios. Current deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based approaches to FJSP predominantly employ constructive methods. While effective, they often fall short of reaching (near-)optimal solutions. In contrast, improvement-based methods iteratively explore the neighborhood of initial solutions and are more effective in approaching optimality. However, the flexible machine allocation in FJSP poses significant challenges to the application of this framework, including accurate state representation, effective policy learning, and efficient search strategies. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a Memory-enhanced Improvement Search framework with heterogeneous graph representation--MIStar. It employs a novel heterogeneous disjunctive graph that explicitly models the operation sequences on machines to accurately represent scheduling solutions. Moreover, a memoryenhanced heterogeneous graph neural network (MHGNN) is designed for feature extraction, leveraging historical trajectories to enhance the decision-making capability of the policy network. Finally, a parallel greedy search strategy is adopted to explore the solution space, enabling superior solutions with fewer iterations. Extensive experiments on synthetic data and public benchmarks demonstrate that MIStar significantly outperforms both traditional handcrafted improvement heuristics and state-of-the-art DRL-based constructive methods.
tldr: This paper introduces MIStar, a memory-enhanced improvement search framework using heterogeneous graph representation and a graph neural network, to solve flexible job shop scheduling problems, outperforming existing DRL and heuristic methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为MIStar的内存增强改进搜索框架，它使用异构图表示和图神经网络来解决柔性作业车间调度问题，其性能优于现有的DRL和启发式方法。
summary_zh: 工业4.0背景下智能制造的兴起带来了大规模定制和动态生产，对更先进和灵活的调度技术提出了需求。柔性作业车间调度问题(FJSP)因其复杂的约束和与实际生产场景的高度一致性而备受关注。目前基于深度强化学习(DRL)的FJSP方法主要采用构造性方法。虽然有效，但通常难以达到(近)最优解。相比之下，改进型方法迭代地探索初始解的邻域，在逼近最优性方面更有效。然而，FJSP中灵活的机器分配对该框架的应用提出了重大挑战，包括准确的状态表示、有效的策略学习和高效的搜索策略。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种基于异构图表示的、具有记忆增强的改进搜索框架——MIStar。它采用了一种新颖的异构析取图，显式地建模机器上的工序序列，以准确地表示调度方案。此外，设计了一种记忆增强的异构图神经网络(MHGNN)用于特征提取，利用历史轨迹来增强策略网络的决策能力。最后，采用并行贪婪搜索策略来探索解空间，从而能够以更少的迭代次数获得更优的解。在合成数据和公共基准测试上的大量实验表明，MIStar显著优于传统的手工改进启发式算法和最先进的基于DRL的构造性方法。

title: Enhancing User Throughput in Multi-panel mmWave Radio Access Networks for Beam-based MU-MIMO Using a DRL Method
summary: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) communication systems, particularly those leveraging multi-user multiple-input and multiple-output (MU-MIMO) with hybrid beamforming, face challenges in optimizing user throughput and minimizing latency due to the high complexity of dynamic beam selection and management. This paper introduces a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach for enhancing user throughput in multi-panel mmWave radio access networks in a practical network setup. Our DRL-based formulation utilizes an adaptive beam management strategy that models the interaction between the communication agent and its environment as a Markov decision process (MDP), optimizing beam selection based on real-time observations. The proposed framework exploits spatial domain (SD) characteristics by incorporating the cross-correlation between the beams in different antenna panels, the measured reference signal received power (RSRP), and the beam usage statistics to dynamically adjust beamforming decisions. As a result, the spectral efficiency is improved and end-to-end latency is reduced. The numerical results demonstrate an increase in throughput of up to 16% and a reduction in latency by factors 3-7x compared to baseline (legacy beam management).
tldr: This paper proposes a DRL-based adaptive beam management strategy for mmWave MU-MIMO systems, achieving significant throughput increase and latency reduction compared to legacy methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于DRL (深度强化学习) 的自适应波束管理策略，用于毫米波多用户多输入多输出 (MU-MIMO) 系统，与传统方法相比，实现了显著的吞吐量增加和延迟降低。
summary_zh: 毫米波（mmWave）通信系统，特别是那些利用混合波束成形的 multi-user multiple-input and multiple-output (MU-MIMO) 的系统，由于动态波束选择和管理的高度复杂性，在优化用户吞吐量和最小化延迟方面面临挑战。本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的方法，用于在实际网络设置中增强多面板毫米波无线接入网络中的用户吞吐量。我们的基于 DRL 的公式利用了一种自适应波束管理策略，该策略将通信代理与其环境之间的交互建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并基于实时观测优化波束选择。该提出的框架通过结合不同天线面板中波束之间的互相关、测量的参考信号接收功率（RSRP）以及波束使用统计信息来利用空间域（SD）特性，从而动态调整波束赋形决策。结果表明，频谱效率得到提高，端到端延迟得以降低。数值结果表明，与基线（传统波束管理）相比，吞吐量提高了高达 16%，延迟降低了 3-7 倍。

title: RADAR: Learning to Route with Asymmetry-aware DistAnce Representations
summary: Recent neural solvers have achieved strong performance on vehicle routing problems (VRPs), yet they mainly assume symmetric Euclidean distances, restricting applicability to real-world scenarios. A core challenge is encoding the relational features in asymmetric distance matrices of VRPs. Early attempts directly encoded these matrices but often failed to produce compact embeddings and generalized poorly at scale. In this paper, we propose RADAR, a scalable neural framework that augments existing neural VRP solvers with the ability to handle asymmetric inputs. RADAR addresses asymmetry from both static and dynamic perspectives. It leverages Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) on the asymmetric distance matrix to initialize compact and generalizable embeddings that inherently encode the static asymmetry in the inbound and outbound costs of each node. To further model dynamic asymmetry in embedding interactions during encoding, it replaces the standard softmax with Sinkhorn normalization that imposes joint row and column distance awareness in attention weights. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks across various VRPs show that RADAR outperforms strong baselines on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution instances, demonstrating robust generalization and superior performance in solving asymmetric VRPs.
tldr: The paper introduces RADAR, a neural framework that enhances VRP solvers to handle asymmetric distance matrices by using SVD for static asymmetry and Sinkhorn normalization for dynamic asymmetry, achieving better generalization in complex routing problems.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为RADAR的神经网络框架，它通过使用奇异值分解（SVD）处理静态不对称性，并使用Sinkhorn归一化处理动态不对称性，从而增强车辆路径问题（VRP）求解器处理非对称距离矩阵的能力，并在复杂的路径问题中实现了更好的泛化。
summary_zh: 最近的神经求解器在车辆路径问题（VRP）上取得了显著的性能，然而它们主要假设对称欧几里得距离，限制了在真实世界场景中的适用性。一个核心挑战是在VRP的不对称距离矩阵中编码关系特征。早期的尝试直接编码这些矩阵，但通常未能产生紧凑的嵌入，并且在规模上泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出RADAR，一个可扩展的神经框架，通过增强现有的神经VRP求解器使其能够处理不对称输入。RADAR从静态和动态两个角度解决不对称性。它利用不对称距离矩阵的奇异值分解（SVD）来初始化紧凑且可泛化的嵌入，这些嵌入固有地编码了每个节点的流入和流出成本中的静态不对称性。为了进一步建模编码过程中嵌入交互中的动态不对称性，它用Sinkhorn归一化取代了标准softmax，Sinkhorn归一化在注意力权重中施加了联合行和列的距离感知。在各种VRP上的合成和真实世界基准上的大量实验表明，RADAR在同分布和异分布实例上均优于强大的基线，证明了其在解决不对称VRP中的鲁棒泛化能力和卓越性能。

title: COOL-MC: Verifying and Explaining RL Policies for Platelet Inventory Management
summary: Platelets expire within five days. Blood banks face uncertain daily demand and must balance ordering decisions between costly wastage from overstocking and life-threatening shortages from understocking. Reinforcement learning (RL) can learn effective ordering policies for this Markov decision process (MDP), but the resulting neural policies remain black boxes, hindering trust and adoption in safety-critical domains. We apply COOL-MC, a tool that combines RL with probabilistic model checking and explainable RL, to verify and explain a trained policy for the MDP on platelet inventory management inspired by Haijema et al. By constructing a policy-induced discrete-time Markov chain (which includes only the reachable states under the trained policy to reduce memory usage), we verify PCTL properties and provide feature-level explanations. Results show that the trained policy achieves a 2.9% stockout probability and a 1.1% inventory-full (potential wastage) probability within a 200-step horizon, primarily attends to the age distribution of inventory rather than other features such as day of week or pending orders. Action reachability analysis reveals that the policy employs a diverse replenishment strategy, with most order quantities reached quickly, while several are never selected. Counterfactual analysis shows that replacing medium-large orders with smaller ones leaves both safety probabilities nearly unchanged, indicating that these orders are placed in well-buffered inventory states. This first formal verification and explanation of an RL platelet inventory management policy demonstrates COOL-MC's value for transparent, auditable decision-making in safety-critical healthcare supply chain domains.
tldr: The paper presents COOL-MC, a tool for verifying and explaining RL policies, and applies it to platelet inventory management, a safety-critical healthcare domain, to enhance trust and adoption.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了COOL-MC，一个用于验证和解释强化学习策略的工具，并将其应用于血小板库存管理这一安全攸关的医疗领域，以增强信任和采用。
summary_zh: 血小板的有效期为五天。血库面临着不确定的每日需求，必须在过度库存导致的高昂浪费和库存不足导致的危及生命的短缺之间权衡订购决策。强化学习 (RL) 可以为该马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 学习有效的订购策略，但由此产生的神经策略仍然是黑盒，阻碍了在安全关键领域的信任和采用。我们应用 COOL-MC，一种结合了 RL、概率模型检验和可解释 RL 的工具，来验证和解释基于 Haijema 等人提出的血小板库存管理 MDP 训练策略。通过构建策略诱导的离散时间马尔可夫链（仅包含训练策略下的可达状态，以减少内存使用），我们验证了 PCTL 属性并提供了特征级别的解释。结果表明，训练后的策略在 200 步范围内实现了 2.9% 的缺货概率和 1.1% 的库存满溢（潜在浪费）概率，主要关注库存的年龄分布，而不是一周中的哪一天或待处理订单等其他特征。行动可达性分析表明，该策略采用多样化的补货策略，大多数订购数量都能快速达到，而有几个数量则从未被选择。反事实分析表明，用较小的订单替换中等大小的订单几乎不会改变两种安全概率，表明这些订单是在缓冲良好的库存状态下下的。对 RL 血小板库存管理策略的首次正式验证和解释证明了 COOL-MC 在安全关键的医疗保健供应链领域中透明、可审核的决策制定的价值。

title: Towards an Incremental Unified Multimodal Anomaly Detection: Augmenting Multimodal Denoising From an Information Bottleneck Perspective
summary: The quest for incremental unified multimodal anomaly detection seeks to empower a single model with the ability to systematically detect anomalies across all categories and support incremental learning to accommodate emerging objects/categories. Central to this pursuit is resolving the catastrophic forgetting dilemma, which involves acquiring new knowledge while preserving prior learned knowledge. Despite some efforts to address this dilemma, a key oversight persists: ignoring the potential impact of spurious and redundant features on catastrophic forgetting. In this paper, we delve into the negative effect of spurious and redundant features on this dilemma in incremental unified frameworks, and reveal that under similar conditions, the multimodal framework developed by naive aggregation of unimodal architectures is more prone to forgetting. To address this issue, we introduce a novel denoising framework called IB-IUMAD, which exploits the complementary benefits of the Mamba decoder and information bottleneck fusion module: the former dedicated to disentangle inter-object feature coupling, preventing spurious feature interference between objects; the latter serves to filter out redundant features from the fused features, thus explicitly preserving discriminative information. A series of theoretical analyses and experiments on MVTec 3D-AD and Eyecandies datasets demonstrates the effectiveness and competitive performance of IB-IUMAD.
tldr: This paper presents a novel multimodal anomaly detection framework, IB-IUMAD, that addresses catastrophic forgetting by disentangling inter-object feature coupling and filtering out redundant features, achieving competitive performance on MVTec 3D-AD and Eyecandies datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的多模态异常检测框架IB-IUMAD，通过解耦对象间的特征耦合和过滤冗余特征来解决灾难性遗忘问题，并在MVTec 3D-AD和Eyecandies数据集上取得了有竞争力的性能。
summary_zh: 针对增量统一多模态异常检测的研究旨在赋予单个模型系统性地检测所有类别的异常，并支持增量学习以适应新兴对象/类别。该研究的核心是解决灾难性遗忘困境，即在获取新知识的同时保留先前习得的知识。尽管已有一些工作致力于解决这一困境，但一个关键的疏忽仍然存在：忽略了虚假和冗余特征对灾难性遗忘的潜在影响。在本文中，我们深入研究了虚假和冗余特征对增量统一框架中该困境的负面影响，并揭示了在相似条件下，通过简单聚合单模态架构开发的多模态框架更容易发生遗忘。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的去噪框架，称为 IB-IUMAD，它利用了 Mamba 解码器和信息瓶颈融合模块的互补优势：前者专门用于解开对象间的特征耦合，防止对象间的虚假特征干扰；后者用于过滤掉融合特征中的冗余特征，从而显式地保留判别性信息。在 MVTec 3D-AD 和 Eyecandies 数据集上进行的一系列理论分析和实验证明了 IB-IUMAD 的有效性和竞争性能。

title: Synthetic-Child: An AIGC-Based Synthetic Data Pipeline for Privacy-Preserving Child Posture Estimation
summary: Accurate child posture estimation is critical for AI-powered study companion devices, yet collecting large-scale annotated datasets of children is both expensive and ethically prohibitive due to privacy concerns. We present Synthetic-Child, an AIGC-based synthetic data pipeline that produces photorealistic child posture training images with ground-truth-projected keypoint annotations, requiring zero real child photographs.
